  <div
    class="search-input-container search-with-dialog position-relative d-flex flex-row flex-items-center tmp-mr-4 rounded"
    data-action="click:qbsearch-input#searchInputContainerClicked"
  >
      <button
        type="button"
        class="header-search-button placeholder  input-button form-control d-flex flex-1 flex-self-stretch flex-items-center no-wrap width-full py-0 pl-2 pr-0 text-left border-0 box-shadow-none"
        data-target="qbsearch-input.inputButton"
        aria-label="Search or jump to…"
        aria-haspopup="dialog"
        placeholder="Search or jump to..."
        data-hotkey=s,/
        autocapitalize="off"
        data-analytics-event="{&quot;location&quot;:&quot;navbar&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;searchbar&quot;,&quot;context&quot;:&quot;global&quot;,&quot;tag&quot;:&quot;input&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;searchbar_input_global_navbar&quot;}"
        data-action="click:qbsearch-input#handleExpand"
      >

        </div>

<div class="Overlay--hidden " data-modal-dialog-overlay>
  <modal-dialog data-action="close:qbsearch-input#handleClose cancel:qbsearch-input#handleClose" data-target="qbsearch-input.searchSuggestionsDialog" role="dialog" id="search-suggestions-dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="search-suggestions-dialog-header" data-view-component="true" class="Overlay Overlay--width-large Overlay--height-auto">
      <h1 id="search-suggestions-dialog-header" class="sr-only">Search code, repositories, users, issues, pull requests...</h1>

    <custom-scopes data-target="qbsearch-input.customScopesManager">
    
<dialog-helper>
  <dialog data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesModalDialog" data-action="close:qbsearch-input#handleDialogClose cancel:qbsearch-input#handleDialogClose" id="custom-scopes-dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="custom-scopes-dialog-title" aria-describedby="custom-scopes-dialog-description" data-view-component="true" class="Overlay Overlay-whenNarrow Overlay--size-medium Overlay--motion-scaleFade Overlay--disableScroll">
    <div data-view-component="true" class="Overlay-header Overlay-header--divided">
  <div class="Overlay-headerContentWrap">
    <div class="Overlay-titleWrap">
      <h1 class="Overlay-title " id="custom-scopes-dialog-title">
        Saved searches
      </h1>
        <h2 id="custom-scopes-dialog-description" class="Overlay-description">Use saved searches to filter your results more quickly</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="Overlay-actionWrap">
      <button data-close-dialog-id="custom-scopes-dialog" aria-label="Close" aria-label="Close" type="button" data-view-component="true" class="close-button Overlay-closeButton"><svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-x">
    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.275.326.749.749 0 0 1-.215.734L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.06Z"></path>
</svg></button>
    </div>
  </div>
  
</div>
      <scrollable-region data-labelled-by="custom-scopes-dialog-title">
        <div data-view-component="true" class="Overlay-body">        <div data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesModalDialogFlash"></div>

        <div hidden class="create-custom-scope-form" data-target="custom-scopes.createCustomScopeForm">
        <!-- '"` --><!-- </textarea></xmp> --></option></form><form id="custom-scopes-dialog-form" data-turbo="false" action="/search/custom_scopes" accept-charset="UTF-8" method="post"><input type="hidden" data-csrf="true" name="authenticity_token" value="htxWgGTDqw74wL/Bjn8xEK1E3Of9yJ7ID+k1pH1uUDNtZfp4wXD2UIMESO/vjeVF0N7oTrB8hAZrqKzrPkCXjw==" />
          <div data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesModalDialogFlash"></div>

          <input type="hidden" id="custom_scope_id" name="custom_scope_id" data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesIdField">

          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="custom_scope_name">Name</label>
            <auto-check src="/search/custom_scopes/check_name" required>
              <input
                type="text"
                name="custom_scope_name"
                id="custom_scope_name"
                data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesNameField"
                class="form-control"
                autocomplete="off"
                placeholder="github-ruby"
                required
                maxlength="50">
              <input type="hidden" data-csrf="true" value="ywleBzUNRDk73HEoCHMFg92Lox4FOqvo3RKbiqoeBD0pK9zsAANO7vIj0qoLO6yravTODmtCnKBn5MYaYWDRSA==" />
            </auto-check>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="custom_scope_query">Query</label>
            <input
              type="text"
              name="custom_scope_query"
              id="custom_scope_query"
              data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesQueryField"
              class="form-control"
              autocomplete="off"
              placeholder="(repo:mona/a OR repo:mona/b) AND lang:python"
              required
              maxlength="500">
          </div>

          <p class="text-small color-fg-muted">
            To see all available qualifiers, see our <a class="Link--inTextBlock" href="https://docs.github.com/search-github/github-code-search/understanding-github-code-search-syntax">documentation</a>.
          </p>
</form>        </div>

        <div data-target="custom-scopes.manageCustomScopesForm">
          <div data-target="custom-scopes.list"></div>
        </div>

</div>
      </scrollable-region>
      <div data-view-component="true" class="Overlay-footer Overlay-footer--alignEnd Overlay-footer--divided">          <button data-action="click:custom-scopes#customScopesCancel" type="button" data-view-component="true" class="btn">    Cancel
</button>
          <button form="custom-scopes-dialog-form" data-action="click:custom-scopes#customScopesSubmit" data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesSubmitButton" type="submit" data-view-component="true" class="btn-primary btn">    Create saved search
</button>
</div>
</dialog></dialog-helper>
    </custom-scopes>
  </div>
</qbsearch-input>

  <template class="js-flash-template">
    
<div class="flash flash-full   {{ className }}">
  <div >
    <button autofocus class="flash-close js-flash-close" type="button" aria-label="Dismiss this message">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-x">
    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.275.326.749.749 0 0 1-.215.734L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.06Z"></path>
</svg>
    </button>
    <div aria-atomic="true" role="alert" class="js-flash-alert">
      
      <div>{{ message }}</div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>
  </template>
</div>

cases of IEEE754 rounding, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1279\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/1279/hovercard\"\u003e#1279\u003c/a\u003e, thanks \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/petamoriken\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@petamoriken\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003ePrevented injection \u003ccode\u003eprocess\u003c/code\u003e polyfill to \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e via some bundlers or \u003ccode\u003eesm.sh\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1277\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/1277/hovercard\"\u003e#1277\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome minor fixes and stylistic changes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCompat data improvements:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-with-resolvers\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003ePromise.withResolvers\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e marked as supported \u003ca href=\"https://bun.sh/blog/bun-v0.7.1#bun-ismainthread-and-promise-withresolvers\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003efrom Bun 0.7.1\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Opera Android 77 compat data href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers\"\u003eIterator Helpers stage 3 proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.iterator\u003c/code\u003e fallback from callable check to \u003ccode\u003eundefined\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003enull\u003c/code\u003e check, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2023-05/may-16.md#iterator-helpers-should-symboliterator-fallback-be-a-callable-check-or-an-undefinednull-check\"\u003eMay 2023 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/272\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" \u003ccode\u003eIsCallable\u003c/code\u003e check on \u003ccode\u003eNextMethod\u003c/code\u003e, deferring errors to \u003ccode\u003eCall\u003c/code\u003e site, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2023-05/may-16.md#iterator-helpers-should-malformed-iterators-fail-early-or-fail-only-when-iterated\"\u003eMay 2023 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e, methods renamed to end with \u003ccode\u003eSymbol\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2023-05/may-15.md#symbol-predicates\"\u003eMay 2023 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol.isRegistered\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.isRegisteredSymbol\u003c/code\u003e method\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol.isWellKnown\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.isWellKnownSymbol\u003c/code\u003e method\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003evalue\u003c/code\u003e argument of \u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams.prototype.{ has, delete }\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/whatwg/url/pull/735\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/whatwg/url/pull/735/hovercard\"\u003eurl/735\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed some cases of increasing buffer size in \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer.prototype.{ transfer, transferToFixedLength }\u003c/code\u003e polyfills\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed awaiting async \u003ccode\u003eAsyncDisposableStack.prototype.adopt\u003c/code\u003e callback, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1258\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" (IE8-)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a workaround in \u003ccode\u003eObject.{ entries, values }\u003c/code\u003e for some IE versions bug with invisible integer keys on \u003ccode\u003enull\u003c/code\u003e-prototype objects\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded TypeScript definitions to \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1235\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/1235/hovercard\"\u003e#1235\u003c/a\u003e, thanks \u003ca because of \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/issues/2309\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/oven-sh/bun/issues/2309/hovercard\"\u003ea bug\u003c/a\u003e added in 0.6.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.{ group, groupToMap }\u003c/code\u003e marked as no longer supported in WebKit runtimes because of the mentioned above web compat issue. href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-change-array-by-copy\"\u003eChange \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e by copy proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMethods:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.toReversed\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.toSorted\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.toSpliced\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.with\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.toReversed\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.toSorted\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.with\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMoved to stable ES, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/86#issuecomment-1409261397\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/86/hovercard\"\u003eJanuary 2023 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003ees.\u003c/code\u003e namespace modules, \u003ccode\u003e/es/\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e/stable/\u003c/code\u003e namespaces entries\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-json-parse-with-source\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eJSON.parse\u003c/code\u003e source text access Stage 3 proposal\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMethods:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eJSON.parse\u003c/code\u003e patched for support \u003ccode\u003esource\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003ereviver\u003c/code\u003e function arguments\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eJSON.rawJSON\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eJSON.isRawJSON\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eJSON.stringify\u003c/code\u003e patched for support \u003ccode\u003eJSON.rawJSON\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-arraybuffer-transfer\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer.prototype.transfer\u003c/code\u003e and friends Stage 3 proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBuilt-ins:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer.prototype.detached\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer.prototype.transfer\u003c/code\u003e (only in runtimes with native \u003ccode\u003estructuredClone\u003c/code\u003e with \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer\u003c/code\u003e transfer support)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer.prototype.transferToFixedLength\u003c/code\u003e (only in runtimes with native \u003ccode\u003estructuredClone\u003c/code\u003e with \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer\u003c/code\u003e transfer support)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIn backwards, in runtimes with native \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer.prototype.transfer\u003c/code\u003e, but without proper \u003ccode\u003estructuredClone\u003c/code\u003e, added \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer\u003c/code\u003e transfer support to \u003ccode\u003estructuredClone\u003c/code\u003e polyfill\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers\"\u003eIterator Helpers\u003c/a\u003e proposal:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSplit into 2 (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers\"\u003esync\u003c/a\u003e and \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-async-iterator-helpers\"\u003easync\u003c/a\u003e) proposals, async version moved back to Stage 2, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/86#issuecomment-1410926068\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/86/hovercard\"\u003eJanuary 2023 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAllowed interleaved mapping in \u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator\u003c/code\u003e helpers, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/262\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/issues/262/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/262\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management\"\u003eExplicit Resource Management\u003c/a\u003e Stage 3 and \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-async-explicit-resource-management/\"\u003eAsync Explicit Resource Management\u003c/a\u003e Stage 2 proposals:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eInstallErrorCause\u003c/code\u003e removed from \u003ccode\u003eSuppressedError\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/86#issuecomment-1410889704\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/86/hovercard\"\u003eJanuary 2023 TC39 data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management/pull/146/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-explicit-resource-management/145\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSimplified internal behaviour of \u003ccode\u003e{ AsyncDisposableStack, DisposableStack }.prototype.use\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management/pull/143\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management/pull/143/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-explicit-resource-management/143\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-symbol-predicates\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol\u003c/code\u003e predicates Stage 2 proposal\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMethods:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol.isRegistered\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol.isWellKnown\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eNumber.range\u003c/code\u003e Stage 1 proposal and method \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-Number.range\"\u003erenamed to \u003ccode\u003eIterator.range\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eFunction.prototype.unThis\u003c/code\u003e Stage 0 proposal and method \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/js-choi/proposal-function-demethodize\"\u003erenamed to \u003ccode\u003eFunction.prototype.demethodize\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ca href=\"https://bugs.webkit.org/show_bug.cgi?id=251757\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eSafari \u003ccode\u003eString.prototype.toWellFormed\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003eToString\u003c/code\u003e conversion bug\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved some cases handling of array-replacer in \u003ccode\u003eJSON.stringify\u003c/code\u003e symbols handling fix\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed many other old \u003ccode\u003eJSON.{ parse, stringify }\u003c/code\u003e bugs (numbers instead of strings as keys in replacer, handling negative zeroes, spaces, some more handling symbols cases, etc.)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed configurability and \u003ccode\u003eToString\u003c/code\u003e conversion of some accessors\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded throwing proper errors on an incorrect context in some \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eDataView\u003c/code\u003e methods\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome minor \u003ccode\u003eDataView\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%\u003c/code\u003e polyfills optimizations\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded proper error on the excess number of trailing \u003ccode\u003e=\u003c/code\u003e in the \u003ccode\u003eatob\u003c/code\u003e polyfill\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed theoretically possible ReDoS vulnerabilities in \u003ccode\u003eString.prototype.{ trim, trimEnd, trimRight }\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eparse(Int|Float)\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eNumber\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eatob\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003eURL\u003c/code\u003e polyfills in some ancient engines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCompat data improvements:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eRegExp.prototype.flags\u003c/code\u003e marked as fixed from V8 ~ Chrome 111\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Opera Android 73 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded TypeScript definitions to \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Quest Browser 25 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded React Native 0.71 Hermes compat data\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Electron unconditional forced replacement disabled for features that survived to Stage 3\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e.from\u003c/code\u003e accept strings, \u003ccode\u003e.flatMap\u003c/code\u003e throws on strings returned from the callback, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/244\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/issues/244/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/244\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/250\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/250/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/250\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e.from\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e.flatMap\u003c/code\u003e throws on non-object \u003cem\u003eiterators\u003c/em\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/253\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/253/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/253\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-set-methods\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet\u003c/code\u003e methods proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBuilt-ins:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet.prototype.intersection\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet.prototype.union\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet.prototype.difference\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet.prototype.symmetricDifference\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet.prototype.isSubsetOf\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet.prototype.isSupersetOf\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet.prototype.isDisjointFrom\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMoved to Stage 3, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/85#issuecomment-1332175557\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/85/hovercard\"\u003eNovember 2022 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReimplemented with \u003ca href=\"https://tc39.es/proposal-set-methods/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003enew semantics\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOptimized performance (iteration over lowest set)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAccepted only \u003ccode\u003eSet\u003c/code\u003e-like objects as an argument, not all iterables\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAccepted only \u003ccode\u003eSet\u003c/code\u003es as \u003ccode\u003ethis\u003c/code\u003e, no \u003ccode\u003e@@species\u003c/code\u003e support, and other minor changes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/actual/\u003c/code\u003e entries, unconditional forced replacement changed to feature detection\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFor avoiding breaking changes:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNew versions of methods are implemented as new modules and available in new entries or entries where old versions of methods were not available before (like \u003ccode\u003e/actual/\u003c/code\u003e namespace)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIn entries where they were available before (like \u003ccode\u003e/full/\u003c/code\u003e namespace), those methods are available with fallbacks to old semantics (in addition to \u003ccode\u003eSet\u003c/code\u003e-like, they accept iterable objects). This behavior will be removed from the next major release\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-is-usv-string\"\u003eWell-Formed Unicode Strings\u003c/a\u003e proposal:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMethods:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString.prototype.isWellFormed\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString.prototype.toWellFormed\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMoved to Stage 3, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/85#issuecomment-1332180862\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/85/hovercard\"\u003eNovember 2022 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/actual/\u003c/code\u003e entries, disabled unconditional forced replacement\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management\"\u003eExplicit resource management\u003c/a\u003e Stage 3 and \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-async-explicit-resource-management\"\u003eAsync explicit resource management\u003c/a\u003e Stage 2 proposals:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRenamed from \"\u003ccode\u003eusing\u003c/code\u003e statement\" and \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management/pull/131\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management/pull/131/hovercard\"\u003esplit into 2 (sync and async) proposals\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIn addition to already present well-known symbols, added new built-ins:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol.dispose\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol.asyncDispose\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSuppressedError\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDisposableStack\u003c/code\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDisposableStack.prototype.dispose\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDisposableStack.prototype.use\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDisposableStack.prototype.adopt\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDisposableStack.prototype.defer\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDisposableStack.prototype.move\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDisposableStack.prototype[@@dispose]\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncDisposableStack\u003c/code\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncDisposableStack.prototype.disposeAsync\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncDisposableStack.prototype.use\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncDisposableStack.prototype.adopt\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncDisposableStack.prototype.defer\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncDisposableStack.prototype.move\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncDisposableStack.prototype[@@asyncDispose]\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator.prototype[@@dispose]\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator.prototype[@@asyncDispose]\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSync version of this proposal moved to Stage 3, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/85#issuecomment-1333747094\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/85/hovercard\"\u003eNovember 2022 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/actual/\u003c/code\u003e namespace entries for Stage 3 proposal\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-dedent\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString.dedent\u003c/code\u003e stage 2 proposal\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMethod \u003ccode\u003eString.dedent\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eThrows an error on non-frozen raw templates for avoiding possible breaking changes in the future, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-dedent/issues/75\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-string-dedent/issues/75/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-string-dedent/75\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"/zloirock/core-js/blob/v3.32.2/packages/core-js-compat#targets-option\"\u003eCompat data targets\u003c/a\u003e improvements:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://reactnative.dev/blog/2022/07/08/hermes-as-the-default\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eReact Native from 0.70 shipped with Hermes as the default engine.\u003c/a\u003e However, bundled Hermes versions differ from standalone Hermes releases. So added \u003cstrong\u003e\u003ccode\u003ereact-native\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e target for React Native with bundled Hermes.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://developer.oculus.com/documentation/web/browser-intro/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eAccording to the documentation\u003c/a\u003e, Oculus Browser was renamed to Meta Quest Browser, so \u003ccode\u003eoculus\u003c/code\u003e target was renamed to \u003cstrong\u003e\u003ccode\u003equest\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eopera_mobile\u003c/code\u003e target name is confusing since it contains data for the Chromium-based Android version, but iOS Opera is Safari-based. So \u003ccode\u003eopera_mobile\u003c/code\u003e target was renamed to \u003cstrong\u003e\u003ccode\u003eopera-android\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eandroid\u003c/code\u003e target name is also confusing for someone - that means Android WebView, some think thinks that it's Chrome for Android, but they have some differences. For avoiding confusion, added \u003cstrong\u003e\u003ccode\u003echrome-android\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e target.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFor consistency with two previous cases, added \u003cstrong\u003e\u003ccode\u003efirefox-android\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e target.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFor avoiding breaking changes, the \u003ccode\u003eoculus\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eopera_mobile\u003c/code\u003e fields are available in the compat data till the next major release.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCompat data improvements:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-from-async\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.fromAsync\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e marked as supported from Bun 0.3.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-is-usv-string\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString.prototype.{ isWellFormed, toWellFormed }\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e marked as supported from Bun 0.4.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-change-array-by-copy\"\u003eChange \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e by copy proposal\u003c/a\u003e marked as supported from Deno 1.27, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/denoland/deno/pull/16429\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/denoland/deno/pull/16429/hovercard\"\u003edeno/16429\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Deno 1.28 / 1.29 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded NodeJS 19.2 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Samsung Internet 19.0 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Quest Browser 24.0 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed the first version in the Chromium-based Edge compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e{ Map, WeakMap }.prototype.emplace\u003c/code\u003e became stricter \u003ca href=\"https://tc39.es/proposal-upsert/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eby the spec draft\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSmoothed behavior of some conflicting proposals\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved some generic behavior (like \u003ccode\u003e@@species\u003c/code\u003e pattern) of some \u003ccode\u003e.prototype\u003c/code\u003e methods from the \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-collection-methods\"\u003enew collections methods proposal\u003c/a\u003e and the \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-unique\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e deduplication proposal\u003c/a\u003e that \u003cem\u003emost likely\u003c/em\u003e will not be implemented since it contradicts the current TC39 policy\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded pure version of the \u003ccode\u003eNumber\u003c/code\u003e constructor, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1154\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/1154/hovercard\"\u003e#1154\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1155\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/1155/hovercard\"\u003e#1155\u003c/a\u003e, thanks \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/trosos\"\u003e@trosos\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eset(Timeout|Interval|Immediate)\u003c/code\u003e extra arguments fix for Bun 0.3.0- (similarly to IE9-), \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/issues/1633\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/oven-sh/bun/issues/1633/hovercard\"\u003ebun/1633\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed handling of sparse arrays in \u003ccode\u003estructuredClone\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1156\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/1156/hovercard\"\u003e#1156\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a theoretically possible future conflict of polyfills definitions in the pure version\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome refactoring and optimization\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" since it's on Stage 3\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvoiding a check of the target in the internal \u003ccode\u003efunction-uncurry-this\u003c/code\u003e helper where it's not required - minor \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2022-09/sep-14.md#arrayfromasync-for-stage-3\"\u003eSeptember TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvoid observable side effects of \u003ccode\u003e%Array.prototype.values%\u003c/code\u003e usage in array-like branch, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-from-async/pull/30\" href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-is-usv-string\"\u003ewell-formed unicode strings stage 2 proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString.prototype.isWellFormed\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString.prototype.toWellFormed\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRecent updates of the \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers\"\u003eiterator helpers proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a counter parameter to helpers, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/211\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/211/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/211\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDon't await non-objects returned from functions passed to \u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator\u003c/code\u003e helpers, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/239\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/239/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/239\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e{ Iterator, AsyncIterator }.prototype.flatMap\u003c/code\u003e supports returning both - iterables and iterators, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/233\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/233/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/233\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eEarly exit on broken \u003ccode\u003e.next\u003c/code\u003e in missed cases of \u003ccode\u003e{ Iterator, AsyncIterator }.from\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/232\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" properly convert objects to numbers\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003esideEffects\u003c/code\u003e field to \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-pure\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003epackage.json\u003c/code\u003e for better tree shaking, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1117\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/1117/hovercard\"\u003e#1117\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDropped \u003ccode\u003esemver\u003c/code\u003e dependency from \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003esemver\u003c/code\u003e package (ironically) added \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/npm/node-semver/commit/d61f828e64260a0a097f26210f5500\"\u003ea breaking change and dropped NodeJS 8 support in the minor \u003ccode\u003e7.1\u003c/code\u003e version\u003c/a\u003e, after that \u003ccode\u003esemver\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e was pinned to \u003ccode\u003e7.0\u003c/code\u003e since for avoiding breaking changes it should support NodeJS 8. However, since \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e is usually used with other packages that use \u003ccode\u003esemver\u003c/code\u003e dependency, it causes multiple duplication of \u003ccode\u003esemver\u003c/code\u003e in dependencies. So I decided to remove \u003ccode\u003esemver\u003c/code\u003e dependency and replace it with a couple of simple helpers.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Bun 0.1.6-0.1.11 compat data\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Deno 1.25 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated Electron 21 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome stylistic changes, minor fixes, and improvements\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.prototype.__proto__\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e polyfill\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIt's optional, legacy, and in some cases (mainly because of developers' mistakes) can cause problems, but \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/denoland/deno/issues/13321\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/denoland/deno/issues/13321/hovercard\"\u003esome libraries depend on it\u003c/a\u003e, and most code can't work without the proper libraries' ecosystem\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOnly for modern engines where this feature is missed (like Deno), it's not installed in IE10- since here we have no proper way setting of the prototype\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eWithout fixes of early implementations where it's not an accessor since those fixes are impossible\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOnly for the global version\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eConsidering \u003ccode\u003edocument.all\u003c/code\u003e as an object in some missed cases, see \u003ca href=\"https://tc39.es/ecma262/#sec-IsHTMLDDA-internal-slot\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eECMAScript Annex B 3.6\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvoiding unnecessary promise creation and validation result in \u003ccode\u003e%WrapForValid(Async)IteratorPrototype%.return\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/215\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/215/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/215\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed omitting the result of proxing \u003ccode\u003e.return\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003e%IteratorHelperPrototype%.return\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1116\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/1116/hovercard\"\u003e#1116\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed the order creation of properties of iteration result object of some iterators (\u003ccode\u003evalue\u003c/code\u003e should be created before \u003ccode\u003edone\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed some cases of Safari \u0026lt; 13 bug - silent on non-writable array \u003ccode\u003e.length\u003c/code\u003e setting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer.length\u003c/code\u003e in V8 ~ Chrome 27-\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRelaxed condition of re-usage native \u003ccode\u003eWeakMap\u003c/code\u003e for internal states with multiple \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e copies\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvailability cloning of \u003ccode\u003eFileList\u003c/code\u003e in the \u003ccode\u003estructuredClone\u003c/code\u003e polyfill extended to some more old engines versions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome stylistic changes and minor fixes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eThrowing a \u003ccode\u003eTypeError\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e in case of passing invalid module names / filters for avoiding unexpected result, related to \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1115\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/1115/hovercard\"\u003e#1115\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded missed NodeJS 13.2 to \u003ccode\u003eesmodules\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e target\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Electron 21 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Oculus Browser 23.0 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers\"\u003eiterator helpers proposal\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1101\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e.asIndexedPairs\u003c/code\u003e renamed to \u003ccode\u003e.indexed\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/183\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/183/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/183\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator.prototype.asIndexedPairs\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eIterator.prototype.indexed\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator.prototype.asIndexedPairs\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator.prototype.indexed\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvoid exposing spec fiction \u003ccode\u003e%AsyncFromSyncIteratorPrototype%\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator.from\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eIterator.prototype.toAsync\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/182\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/182/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/182\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/202\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/202/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/202\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvoid unnecessary promise creation in \u003ccode\u003e%WrapForValidAsyncIteratorPrototype%.next\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/197\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/197/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/197\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDo not validate value in \u003ccode\u003e%WrapForValid(Async)IteratorPrototype%.next\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/197\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/197/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/197\u003c/a\u003e and \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/205\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/205/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/205\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDo not forward the parameter of \u003ccode\u003e.next\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003e.return\u003c/code\u003e to an underlying iterator by the extended iterator protocol, a part of \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/194\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/194/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/194\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e.throw\u003c/code\u003e methods Iterator, AsyncIterator }.prototype.flatMap\u003c/code\u003e proxy iterators on \u003ccode\u003e.return\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/195\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/195/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-iterator-helpers/195\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eThrow \u003ccode\u003eRangeError\u003c/code\u003e on \u003ccode\u003eNaN\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003e{ Iterator, AsyncIterator }.prototype.{ drop, take }\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-find-from-last\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e find from last\u003c/a\u003e moved to the stable ES, according to June 2022 TC39 meeting:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.findLast\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.findLastIndex\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.findLast\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.findLastIndex\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMethods from \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-grouping\"\u003ethe \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e grouping proposal\u003c/a\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-grouping/pull/39\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-array-grouping/pull/39/hovercard\"\u003erenamed\u003c/a\u003e, according to June 2022 TC39 meeting:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.groupBy\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.group\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.groupByToMap\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.groupToMap\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged the order of operations in \u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.with\u003c/code\u003e following \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-change-array-by-copy/issues/86\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-change-array-by-copy/pull/86/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-change-array-by-copy/86\u003c/a\u003e, according to June 2022 TC39 meeting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-decorator-metadata\"\u003eDecorator Metadata proposal\u003c/a\u003e extracted from \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-decorators\"\u003eDecorators proposal\u003c/a\u003e as a separate stage 2 proposal, according to March 2022 TC39 meeting, \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.metadataKey\u003c/code\u003e replaces \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.metadata\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.push\u003c/code\u003e polyfill with some fixes for modern engines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.unshift\u003c/code\u003e polyfill with some fixes for modern engines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a bug in the order of getting flags in \u003ccode\u003eRegExp.prototype.flags\u003c/code\u003e in the actual version of V8\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed property descriptors of some \u003ccode\u003eMath\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eNumber\u003c/code\u003e constants\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a workaround of V8 \u003ccode\u003eArrayBufferDetaching\u003c/code\u003e protector cell invalidation and performance degradation on \u003ccode\u003estructuredClone\u003c/code\u003e feature detection, one more case of \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/679\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/679/hovercard\"\u003e#679\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded detection of NodeJS \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-change-array-by-copy\"\u003eChange \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e by copy proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMoved to Stage 3, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/81#issuecomment-1083449843\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/81/hovercard\"\u003eMarch TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDisabled forced replacement and added \u003ccode\u003e/actual/\u003c/code\u003e entry points for methods from this proposal\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.toSpliced\u003c/code\u003e throws a \u003ccode\u003eTypeError\u003c/code\u003e instead of \u003ccode\u003eRangeError\u003c/code\u003e if the result length is more than \u003ccode\u003eMAX_SAFE_INTEGER\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-change-array-by-copy/pull/70\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-change-array-by-copy/pull/70/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-change-array-by-copy/70\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded some more \u003ccode\u003eatob\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ebtoa\u003c/code\u003e fixes:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNodeJS \u0026lt;17.9 \u003ccode\u003eatob\u003c/code\u003e does not ignore spaces, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/nodejs/node/issues/42530\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/nodejs/node/issues/42530/hovercard\"\u003enode/42530\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eActual NodeJS \u003ccode\u003eatob\u003c/code\u003e does not validate encoding, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/nodejs/node/issues/42646\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/nodejs/node/issues/42646/hovercard\"\u003enode/42646\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFF26- implementation does not properly convert argument to string\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIE / Edge \u0026lt;16 implementation have wrong arity\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/full/\u003c/code\u003e namespace as the replacement for \u003ccode\u003e/features/\u003c/code\u003e since it's more descriptive in context of the rest namespaces (\u003ccode\u003e/es/\u003c/code\u003e ⊆ \u003ccode\u003e/stable/\u003c/code\u003e ⊆ \u003ccode\u003e/actual/\u003c/code\u003e ⊆ \u003ccode\u003e/full/\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvoided propagation of removed parts of proposals to upper stages. For example, \u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.groupBy\u003c/code\u003e was removed from the \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e grouping proposal a long time ago. We can't completely remove this method since it's a breaking change. But this proposal has been promoted to stage 3 - so the proposal should be promoted without this method, this method should not be available in \u003ccode\u003e/actual/\u003c/code\u003e entries - but it should be available in early-stage entries to avoid breakage.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSignificant internal refactoring and splitting of modules (but without exposing to public API since it will be a breaking change - it will be exposed in the next major version)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBug fixes:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed work of non-standard V8 \u003ccode\u003eError\u003c/code\u003e features with wrapped \u003ccode\u003eError\u003c/code\u003e constructors, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1061\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/1061/hovercard\"\u003e#1061\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003enull\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eundefined\u003c/code\u003e allowed as the second argument of \u003ccode\u003estructuredClone\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1056\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/1056/hovercard\"\u003e#1056\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eTooling:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eStabilized proposals are filtered out from the \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-bundle\u003c/code\u003e output. That mean that if the output contains, for example, \u003ccode\u003ees.object.has-own\u003c/code\u003e, the legacy reference to it, \u003ccode\u003eesnext.object.has-own\u003c/code\u003e, no longer added.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAligned modules filters of \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/tree/master/packages/core-js-builder\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e and \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/tree/master/packages/core-js-compat\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e, now it's \u003ccode\u003emodules\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eexclude\u003c/code\u003e options\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support of entry points, modules, regexes, and arrays of them to those filters\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMissed \u003ccode\u003etargets\u003c/code\u003e option of \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e means that the \u003ccode\u003etargets\u003c/code\u003e filter just will not be applied, so the result will contain modules required for all possible engines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCompat data:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e.stack\u003c/code\u003e property on \u003ccode\u003eDOMException\u003c/code\u003e marked as supported from Deno \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/denoland/deno/releases/tag/v1.15.0\"\u003e1.15\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Deno 1.21 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Electron 19.0 and updated 18.0 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Samsung Internet 17.0 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Opera Android 68 compat data mapping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" \u003ccode\u003estructuredClone\u003c/code\u003e method \u003ca href=\"https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/structured-data.html#dom-structuredclone\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003efrom the HTML spec\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/structuredClone\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003esee MDN\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIncludes all cases of cloning and transferring of required ECMAScript and platform types that can be polyfilled, for the details see \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#caveats-when-using-structuredclone-polyfill\"\u003ethe caveats\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUses native structured cloning algorithm implementations where it's possible\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIncludes the new semantic of errors cloning from \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/5749\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/whatwg/html/pull/5749/hovercard\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003ehtml/5749\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eDOMException\u003c/code\u003e polyfill, \u003ca href=\"https://webidl.spec.whatwg.org/#idl-DOMException\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ethe Web IDL spec\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/DOMException\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003esee MDN\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIncludes \u003ccode\u003eDOMException\u003c/code\u003e and its attributes polyfills with fixes of many different engines bugs\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIncludes \u003ccode\u003eDOMException#stack\u003c/code\u003e property polyfill in engines that should have it\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReuses native \u003ccode\u003eDOMException\u003c/code\u003e implementations where it's possible (for example, in old NodeJS where it's not exposed as global)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-error-cause\"\u003esupport of \u003ccode\u003ecause\u003c/code\u003e on all Error types\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer\u003c/code\u003es are non-extensible, but \u003ccode\u003eObject.isExtensible\u003c/code\u003e does not report it:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed in \u003ccode\u003eObject.{ isExtensible, isSealed, isFrozen }\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eReflect.isExtensible\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed handling of preventing possible cases of breaking / observing the internal state by patching / deleting of them\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvoid \u003ccode\u003e.call\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003e.apply\u003c/code\u003e prototype methods that could be patched\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvoid \u003ccode\u003einstanceof\u003c/code\u003e operator - implicit \u003ccode\u003e.prototype\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003e@@hasInstance\u003c/code\u003e access that could be patched\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAvoid \u003ccode\u003eRegExp#test\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eString#match\u003c/code\u003e and some over methods - implicit \u003ccode\u003e.exec\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eRegExp\u003c/code\u003e well-known symbols access that could be patched\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eClearing of \u003ccode\u003eError\u003c/code\u003e stack from extra entries experimentally added to \u003ccode\u003eAggregateError\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/pull/996\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/996/hovercard\"\u003e#996\u003c/a\u003e, in case lack of problems it will be extended to other cases\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIn engines with native \u003ccode\u003eSymbol\u003c/code\u003e support, new well-known symbols created with usage \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.for\u003c/code\u003e for ensuring the same keys in different realms, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/998\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/998/hovercard\"\u003e#998\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a workaround of \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/jvilk/bfs-process/issues/5\" reports V8 version that's used in some cases of \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e feature detection\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed normalization of \u003ccode\u003emessage\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003eAggregateError\u003c/code\u003e argument\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed order of arguments conversion in \u003ccode\u003eMath.scale\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/rwaldron/proposal-math-extensions/issues/24\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/rwaldron/proposal-math-extensions/issues/24/hovercard\"\u003ea spec draft (\u003ccode\u003eObject.hasOwn\u003c/code\u003e) proposal\u003c/a\u003e moved to the stable ES, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/76#issuecomment-909288348\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/76/hovercard\"\u003eper August 2021 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-relative-indexing-method\"\u003eRelative indexing method (\u003ccode\u003e.at\u003c/code\u003e) proposal\u003c/a\u003e moved to the stable ES, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/76#issuecomment-909285053\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/76/hovercard\"\u003eper August 2021 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eExposed by default the stable version of \u003ccode\u003eString.prototype.at\u003c/code\u003e. It was not exposed because of the conflict with the alternative obsolete proposal (that will be completely removed in the next major version). For the backward compatibility, in the case of loading this proposal, it will be overwritten.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome more iteration closing fixes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed an ES3 reserved words usage, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/980\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" mainly to \u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator.from\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator.prototype.flatMap\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eHandling of optional \u003ccode\u003e.next\u003c/code\u003e arguments in \u003ccode\u003e(Async)Iterator\u003c/code\u003e methods is aligned with the current spec draft (mainly - ignoring the first passed to \u003ccode\u003e.next\u003c/code\u003e argument in built-in generators)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBehavior of \u003ccode\u003e.next\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e.return\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e.throw\u003c/code\u003e methods on \u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator\u003c/code\u003e helpers proxy iterators aligned with the current spec draft (built-in async generators) (mainly - some early errors moved to returned promises)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed some cases of safe iteration closing\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed dependencies of some entry href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-find-from-last/pull/47\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-array-find-from-last/pull/47/hovercard\"\u003eJuly 2021 TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-filtering\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e filtering stage 1 proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.filterReject\u003c/code\u003e replaces \u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.filterOut\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.filterReject\u003c/code\u003e replaces \u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.filterOut\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-grouping\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e grouping stage 1 proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype.groupBy\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.prototype.groupBy\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eWork with symbols made stricter: some missed before cases of methods that should throw an error on symbols now works as they should\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eHandling \u003ccode\u003e@@toPrimitive\u003c/code\u003e in some cases of \u003ccode\u003eToPrimitive\u003c/code\u003e internal logic made stricter\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed work of \u003ccode\u003eRequest\u003c/code\u003e with polyfilled \u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/965\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/965/hovercard\"\u003e#965\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed possible exposing of collections elements metadata in some cases, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/427\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/427/hovercard\"\u003e#427\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed crashing of \u003ccode\u003eObject.create(null)\u003c/code\u003e on WSH, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/966\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/966/hovercard\"\u003e#966\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed some cases of typed arrays subclassing logic\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a minor bug related to string conversion in \u003ccode\u003eRegExp#exec\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eDate.prototype.getYear\u003c/code\u003e feature detection\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed content of some entry points\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome minor optimizations and refactoring\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDeno:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Deno support (sure, after bundling since Deno does not support CommonJS)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAllowed \u003ccode\u003edeno\u003c/code\u003e target in \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eA bundle for Deno published on \u003ca href=\"https://deno.land/x/corejs\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003edeno.land/x/corejs\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded / updated compat data / mapping:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDeno 1.0-1.13\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNodeJS up to 16.6\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eiOS Safari up to 15.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSamsung Internet up to 15.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOpera Android up to 64\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.hasOwn\u003c/code\u003e marked href=\"https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1721149\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eFF92\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDate.prototype.getYear\u003c/code\u003e marked as 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#replaceAll\u003c/code\u003e moved to the stable ES, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/master/meetings/2020-06/june-2.md#stringprototypereplaceall-for-stage-4\"\u003eper June TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ePromise.any\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eAggregateError\u003c/code\u003e moved to the stable ES, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/master/meetings/2020-07/july-21.md#promiseany--aggregateerror-for-stage-4\"\u003eper July TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eReflect[@@toStringTag]\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/2057\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/ecma262/pull/2057/hovercard\"\u003eper July TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eForced replacement of \u003ccode\u003eArray#{ reduce, reduceRight }\u003c/code\u003e in Chrome 80-82 because of \u003ca href=\"https://bugs.chromium.org/p/chromium/issues/detail?id=1049982\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ea bug\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/766\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/766/hovercard\"\u003e#766\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFollowing the changes in \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-upsert\"\u003ethe \u003ccode\u003eupsert\u003c/code\u003e proposal\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e{ Map, WeakMap }#emplace\u003c/code\u003e replace \u003ccode\u003e{ Map, WeakMap }#upsert\u003c/code\u003e, these obsolete methods will be removed in the next major release\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://tc39.es/ecma262/#sec-aggregate-error-constructor\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eBy the current spec\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eAggregateError#errors\u003c/code\u003e is own data property\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded correct iteration closing in the iteration helpers according to the current version of \u003ca href=\"https://tc39.es/proposal-iterator-helpers\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ethe proposal\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eprocess.nextTick\u003c/code\u003e have a less priority than \u003ccode\u003ePromise\u003c/code\u003e in the microtask implementation, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/855\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/855/hovercard\"\u003e#855\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed microtask implementation in engines with \u003ccode\u003eMutationObserver\u003c/code\u003e, but without \u003ccode\u003edocument\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/865\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/865/hovercard\"\u003e#865\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/866\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/866/hovercard\"\u003e#866\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e with an empty (after the targets engines or another filtration) modules list, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/822\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/822/hovercard\"\u003e#822\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed possible twice call of \u003ccode\u003ewindow.onunhandledrejection\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/760\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/760/hovercard\"\u003e#760\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed some possible problems related multiple global copies of \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/880\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/880/hovercard\"\u003e#880\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a workaround for 3rd party \u003ccode\u003eReflect.set\u003c/code\u003e polyfill bug, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/847\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/847/hovercard\"\u003e#847\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated compat data:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChrome up to 86\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFF up to 82\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSafari up to 14\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated compat data mapping:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eiOS up to 14\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNodeJS up to 15.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eElectron up to 11.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSamsung Internet up to 13.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOpera Android up to 60\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eThe rest automatically\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated all required \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003etargets\u003c/code\u003e argument\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAllowed corresponding to Babel \u003ccode\u003etargets.esmodules\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003etargets.browsers\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003etargets.node\u003c/code\u003e options in \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eEngines in compat data and results of targets parsing sorted alphabetically\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003efeatures/instance/match-all\u003c/code\u003e entry compat data\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eArray.prototype[@@unscopables]\u003c/code\u003e descriptor (was writable)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Samsung Internet 11 compat data
