dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#{ matchAll, replaceAll }\u003c/code\u003e throws an error on non-global regex argument per \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/1716\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/ecma262/pull/1716/hovercard\"\u003ethe decision from TC39 meetings\u003c/a\u003e (+ \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-replaceall/pull/24\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-string-replaceall/pull/24/hovercard\"\u003ethis PR\u003c/a\u003e). It's a breaking change, but since it's a breaking change in the ES spec, it's added at the minor release\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eglobalThis\u003c/code\u003e moved to stable ES, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/60#issuecomment-537217903\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/60/hovercard\"\u003eper October TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ePromise.any\u003c/code\u003e moved to stage 3, some minor internal changes, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/60#issuecomment-538084885\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/60/hovercard\"\u003eper October TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#replaceAll\u003c/code\u003e moved to stage 3, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/60#issuecomment-537530013\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/60/hovercard\"\u003eper October TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers\"\u003eiterator helpers stage 2 proposal\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator\u003c/code\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator.from\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#asIndexedPairs\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#drop\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#every\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#filter\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#find\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#flatMap\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#forEach\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#map\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#reduce\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#some\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#take\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#toArray\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eIterator#@@toStringTag\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator\u003c/code\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator.from\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#asIndexedPairs\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#drop\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#every\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#filter\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#find\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#flatMap\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#forEach\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#map\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#reduce\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#some\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#take\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#toArray\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAsyncIterator#@@toStringTag\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated \u003ccode\u003eMap#upsert\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ccode\u003eMap#updateOrInsert\u003c/code\u003e before) \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/thumbsupep/proposal-upsert\"\u003eproposal\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMoved to stage 2, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/60#issuecomment-537606117\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/babel/proposals/issues/60/hovercard\"\u003eper October TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#updateOrInsert\u003c/code\u003e renamed to \u003ccode\u003eMap#upsert\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eWeakMap#upsert\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eYou can don't pass one of the callbacks\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a workaround for iOS Safari MessageChannel + bfcache bug, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/624\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/624/hovercard\"\u003e#624\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a workaround for Chrome 33 / Android 4.4.4 \u003ccode\u003ePromise\u003c/code\u003e bug, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/640\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/640/hovercard\"\u003e#640\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReplaced broken \u003ccode\u003eURL\u003c/code\u003e constructor in Safari and \u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams\u003c/code\u003e in Chrome 66-, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/656\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/656/hovercard\"\u003e#656\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded compat data for Node up to 12.11, FF 69, Samsung up to 10.2 and Phantom 1.9\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMath.hypot\u003c/code\u003e marked as not supported in Chrome 77 since \u003ca href=\"https://bugs.chromium.org/p/v8/issues/detail?id=9546\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ea bug in this method\u003c/a\u003e was not fixed before the stable Chrome 77 release\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed unnecessary exposing on \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.matchAll\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003eesnext.string.match-all\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/626\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/626/hovercard\"\u003e#626\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed missed cases \u003ca July TC39 meeting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ePromise.any\u003c/code\u003e moved to stage 2, \u003ccode\u003e.errors\u003c/code\u003e property of \u003ccode\u003eAggregateError\u003c/code\u003e instances made non-enumerable, per July TC39 meeting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eusing\u003c/code\u003e statement proposal moved to stage 2, added \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.asyncDispose\u003c/code\u003e, per July TC39 meeting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eArray.isTemplateObject\u003c/code\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-is-template-object\"\u003estage 2 proposal\u003c/a\u003e, per June TC39 meeting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eMap#updateOrInsert\u003c/code\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1_xtrGSoN1-l2Q74eCXPHBbbrBHsVyqArWN0ebnW-pVQ/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003estage 1 proposal\u003c/a\u003e, per July TC39 meeting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a fix for \u003ca href=\"https://bugs.chromium.org/p/v8/issues/detail?id=9546\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMath.hypot\u003c/code\u003e V8 7.7 bug\u003c/a\u003e, since it's still not stable without adding results to \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a workaround for APIs where not possible to replace broken native \u003ccode\u003ePromise\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/579\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/579/hovercard\"\u003e#579\u003c/a\u003e - added \u003ccode\u003e.finally\u003c/code\u003e and patched \u003ccode\u003e.then\u003c/code\u003e to / on native \u003ccode\u003ePromise\u003c/code\u003e prototype\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed crashing of Opera Presto, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/595\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/595/hovercard\"\u003e#595\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed incorrect early breaking of \u003ccode\u003e{ Map, Set, WeakMap, WeakSet }.deleteAll\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed some missed dependencies in entry points\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded compat data for Node 12.5, FF 67, Safari 13\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support of \u003ccode\u003eDISABLE_OPENCOLLECTIVE\u003c/code\u003e env variable to \u003ccode\u003epostinstall\u003c/code\u003e script\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-pure\u003c/code\u003e dependency from \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/590\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/590/hovercard\"\u003e#590\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed generation of \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e on Windows, Many minor internal improvements and fixes like:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.keyFor\u003c/code\u003e complexity to \u003ccode\u003eO(1)\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed the order of arguments validation in \u003ccode\u003eString.prototype.{ endsWith, includes, startsWith }\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eInternal implementation of \u003ccode\u003eRegExp#flags\u003c/code\u003e helper now respect \u003ccode\u003edotAll\u003c/code\u003e flag (mainly related to the \u003ccode\u003epure\u003c/code\u003e version)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003ePerformance optimizations related old V8\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eEtc.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/517/hovercard\"\u003e#517\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved \u003ccode\u003ees.regexp.flags\u003c/code\u003e dependency from \u003ccode\u003eObject.getOwnPropertySymbols\u003c/code\u003e in Chrome 38 / 39, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/539\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/539/hovercard\"\u003e#539\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ewindow.postMessage\u003c/code\u003e-based task implementation uses data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/542/hovercard\"\u003e#542\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eLookup \u003ccode\u003ePromiseConstructor.resolve\u003c/code\u003e only once in data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/ecma262/pull/1506/hovercard\"\u003etc39/ecma262#1506\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eTemporarily removed \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e dependency from \u003ccode\u003epostinstall\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded compat data for Chrome 76, FF 67, Node 12\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-prototype-codepoints\"\u003estage 1 proposal\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNew collections methods (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/collection-methods\"\u003estage 1 proposal\u003c/a\u003e)\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap.groupBy\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap.keyBy\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#deleteAll\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#every\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#filter\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#find\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#findKey\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#includes\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#keyOf\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#mapKeys\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#mapValues\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#merge\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#reduce\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#some\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#update\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet#addAll\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet#deleteAll\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet#every\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet#filter\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet#find\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet#join\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet#map\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet#reduce\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSet#some\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eWeakMap#deleteAll\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eWeakSet#addAll\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eWeakSet#deleteAll\u and \u003ccode\u003ecompositeSymbol\u003c/code\u003e methods (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-richer-keys/tree/master/compositeKey\"\u003estage 1 proposal\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eNumber.fromString\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-number-fromstring\"\u003estage 1 proposal\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol.patternMatch\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-pattern-matching\"\u003efor stage 1 pattern matching proposal\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol.dispose\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-using-statement\"\u003efor stage 1 \u003ccode\u003eusing\u003c/code\u003e statement proposal\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ePromise.any\u003c/code\u003e (with \u003ccode\u003eAggregateError\u003c/code\u003e) (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-any\"\u003estage 0 proposal\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParam\u003c/code\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://url.spec.whatwg.org/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003efrom \u003ccode\u003eURL\u003c/code\u003e standard\u003c/a\u003e, also \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/jasnell/proposal-url\"\u003estage 0 proposal to ECMAScript\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL\u003c/code\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#href\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#origin\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#protocol\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#username\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#password\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#host\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#hostname\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#port\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#pathname\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#search\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#searchParams\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#hash\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#toString\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL#toJSON\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams\u003c/code\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#append\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#delete\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#get\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#getAll\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#has\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#set\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#sort\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#toString\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#keys\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#values\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#entries\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams#@@iterator\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e.forEach\u003c/code\u003e method on iterable DOM collections (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/329\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/329/hovercard\"\u003e#329\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImprove existing features:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd triggering unhandled \u003ccode\u003ePromise\u003c/code\u003e rejection events (instead of only global handlers), \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/205\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/205/hovercard\"\u003e#205\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eWrap \u003ccode\u003efetch\u003c/code\u003e for correct with polyfilled \u003ccode\u003ePromise\u003c/code\u003e and preventing problems like \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/178\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/178/hovercard\"\u003e#178\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/332\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/332/hovercard\"\u003e#332\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/371\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/371/hovercard\"\u003e#371\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd support of \u003ccode\u003e@@isConcatSpreadable\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003eArray#concat\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd support of \u003ccode\u003e@@species\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003eArray#{concat, filter, map, slice, splice}\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd direct \u003ccode\u003e.exec\u003c/code\u003e calling to \u003ccode\u003eRegExp#{@@replace, @@split, @@match, @@search}\u003c/code\u003e. Also, added fixes for \u003ccode\u003eRegExp#exec\u003c/code\u003e method. \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/411\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/411/hovercard\"\u003e#411\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/434\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/434/hovercard\"\u003e#434\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/453\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/453/hovercard\"\u003e#453\u003c/a\u003e, thanks \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/nicolo-ribaudo\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@nicolo-ribaudo\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCorrect iterators prototypes chain, related \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/261\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/261/hovercard\"\u003e#261\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCorrect Typed Arrays prototypes chain, related \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/378\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/378/hovercard\"\u003e#378\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMake the internal state of polyfilled features completely unobservable, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/146\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/146/hovercard\"\u003e#146\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd validation of receiver's internal class to missed non-generic methods.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFix descriptors of global properties.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIn the version without global pollution, if \u003ccode\u003eObject#toString\u003c/code\u003e does not support \u003ccode\u003e@@toStringTag\u003c/code\u003e, add to wrapped prototypes own \u003ccode\u003etoString\u003c/code\u003e method with \u003ccode\u003e@@toStringTag\u003c/code\u003e logic, see \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/199\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/199/hovercard\"\u003e#199\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdate standard features and proposals:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003easap\u003c/code\u003e (old stage 0 proposal) replaced by \u003ccode\u003equeueMicrotask\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ca href=\"https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/timers-and-user-prompts.html#dom-queuemicrotask\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ea part of HTML spec\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdate \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-observable\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObservable\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e (#257, #276, etc.)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdate \u003ccode\u003eArray#flatten\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eArray#flat\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eArray#flatMap\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdate \u003ccode\u003eglobal\u003c/code\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-global\"\u003estage 3 proposal\u003c/a\u003e - rename \u003ccode\u003eglobal\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003eglobalThis\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdate \u003ccode\u003eString#matchAll\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/17\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/17/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-string-matchall#17\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/38\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/38/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-string-matchall#38\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/41\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/41/hovercard\"\u003eproposal-string-matchall#41\u003c/a\u003e, etc.) and move to the stage 3\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdate \u003ccode\u003e.name\u003c/code\u003e properties of \u003ccode\u003eString#{trimStart, trimEnd , trimLeft, trimRight}\u003c/code\u003e, move to the stage 3\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemove mongolian vowel separator (U+180E) from the list of whitespaces for methods like \u003ccode\u003eString#trim\u003c/code\u003e (ES6 -\u0026gt; ES7)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMark ES2016, ES2017, ES2018, ES2019 features as stable:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray#{ flat, flatMap }\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e{ Array, %TypedArray% }#includes\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.{ values, entries}\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.getOwnPropertyDescriptors\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#{ padStart, padEnd }\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#{ trimStart, trimEnd, trimLeft, trimRight }\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ePromise#finally\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol.asyncIterator\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject#__(define|lookup)[GS]etter__\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemove obsolete features:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eError.isError\u003c/code\u003e (withdrawn)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSystem.global\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eglobal\u003c/code\u003e (replaced by \u003ccode\u003eglobalThis\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#toJSON\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eSet#toJSON\u003c/code\u003e (rejected)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eRegExp.escape\u003c/code\u003e (rejected)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.enumerate\u003c/code\u003e (removed from the spec)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUnnecessary iteration methods from \u003ccode\u003eCSSRuleList\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eMediaList\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eStyleSheetList\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eNo more non-standard features\u003c/strong\u003e, finally removed:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDict\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.{classof, isObject, define, make}\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eFunction#part\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eNumber#@@iterator\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#{escapeHTML, unescapeHTML}\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003edelay\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd \u003ccode\u003e.sham\u003c/code\u003e flag to features which can't be properly polyfilled and / or not recommended for usage:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSymbol\u003c/code\u003e constructor - we can't add new primitives. \u003ccode\u003eObject.prototype\u003c/code\u003e accessors too expensive.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.{create, defineProperty, defineProperties, getOwnPropertyDescriptor, getOwnPropertyDescriptors}\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eReflect.{defineProperty, getOwnPropertyDescriptor}\u003c/code\u003e can't be properly polyfilled without descriptors support.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.{freeze, seal, preventExtensions}\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eReflect.preventExtensions\u003c/code\u003e can't be properly polyfilled in ES3 environment.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.getPrototypeOf\u003c/code\u003e can be deceived in ES3 environment.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.construct\u003c/code\u003e can't be polyfilled for a correct work with \u003ccode\u003enewTarget\u003c/code\u003e argument on built-ins.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eTyped Array constructors polyfill is quite correct but too expensive.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eURL\u003c/code\u003e constructor in engines without descriptors support.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBug and compatibility fixes:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFix deoptimisation of iterators in V8, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/377\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/377/hovercard\"\u003e#377\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFix import of property before constructor which should contain this property, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/262\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/262/hovercard\"\u003e#262\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFix some cases of IE11 \u003ccode\u003eWeakMap\u003c/code\u003e frozen keys fallback, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/384\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/384/hovercard\"\u003e#384\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFix non-enumerable integer keys issue because of Nashorn ~ JDK8 bug, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/389\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/389/hovercard\"\u003e#389\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFix \u003ca href=\"https://bugs.webkit.org/show_bug.cgi?id=188794\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eSafari 12.0 \u003ccode\u003eArray#reverse\u003c/code\u003e bug\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOne more fix for microtasks in iOS related \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/339\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/339/hovercard\"\u003e#339\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a fallback for \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/mozilla/rhino/issues/346\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/mozilla/rhino/issues/346/hovercard\"\u003eRhino bug\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/440\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/440/hovercard\"\u003e#440\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMany other internal fixes and improvements.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRepository:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChange \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e repository structure to monorepo with packages in \u003ccode\u003e/packages/\u003c/code\u003e directory.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eClean-up it, remove all possible duplicates, generated files, etc.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003ePackages:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eExtract a version without global namespace pollution to a separate \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-pure\u003c/code\u003e package (replacement for \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/library\u003c/code\u003e).\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eLeave only one pair of bundles (global, with all polyfills) and move it to \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-bundle\u003c/code\u003e package.\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemove bundling logic from \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e package, leave it only in \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e package.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eClean-up packages.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBecause of all approaches, \u003cstrong\u003ereduce size of packages from ~2mb for \u003ccode\u003ecore-js@2\u003c/code\u003e to\u003c/strong\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e~500kb for \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e package\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e~440kb for \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-pure\u003c/code\u003e package\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFinally remove \u003ccode\u003ebower.json\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCommonJS API, namespaces:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd availability \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/blob/master/README.md#configurable-level-of-aggressiveness\"\u003econfiguration of aggressiveness\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMove \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/library\u003c/code\u003e to separate \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-pure\u003c/code\u003e package.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBecause of removing all non-standard features, we no longer need \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/shim\u003c/code\u003e entry point, replace it just with \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMove all features from ES5, ES2015, ES2016, ES2017, ES2018 and ES2019 to one namespace for stable ES - it's available as \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/es\u003c/code\u003e, all those features in \u003ccode\u003emodules\u003c/code\u003e folder has \u003ccode\u003ees.\u003c/code\u003e prefix.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChange prefix for ES proposals from \u003ccode\u003ees7.\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003eesnext.\u003c/code\u003e, they no longer available in \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/es7\u003c/code\u003e, use \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/stage/*\u003c/code\u003e instead of that.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRename \u003ccode\u003ecore-js(/library)/fn\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003ecore-js(-pure)/features\u003c/code\u003e for improve readability.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAllow more granular inclusion of features from \u003ccode\u003e/es/\u003c/code\u003e path (for example, \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/es/array/from\u003c/code\u003e).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd \u003ccode\u003e/stable/\u003c/code\u003e entry points as an equal of \u003ccode\u003e/features/\u003c/code\u003e for stable features, without proposals.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd \u003ccode\u003e/proposals/\u003c/code\u003e entry points for allow include all features from one proposal (for example, \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/proposals/reflect-metadata\u003c/code\u003e).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd \u003ccode\u003e/es|stable|features/instance/\u003c/code\u003e entry points for getting polyfill of the related method for passed instance (could be used in cases like \u003ccode\u003ebabel-runtime\u003c/code\u003e).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSplit typed arrays polyfills. Now you can, for example, load only required method (for example, \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/es/typed-array/from\u003c/code\u003e).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eExtract well-known symbols definition from \u003ccode\u003ees.symbol\u003c/code\u003e module for loading only required features, for example, in MS Edge.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRename \u003ccode\u003eweb.dom\u003c/code\u003e namespace to \u003ccode\u003eweb.dom-collections\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRename \u003ccode\u003ees6.regexp.{match, replace, search, split}\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003ees.string.{match, replace, search, split}\u003c/code\u003e - mainly it's fixes / adding support of well-known symbols to string methods, only in second place adding related methods to regexp prototype.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRelax \u003ccode\u003e/modules/\u003c/code\u003e directory by moving internal modules to \u003ccode\u003e/internals/\u003c/code\u003e directory.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemove deprecated array entry points: \u003ccode\u003ecore-js(/library)/fn/array/{pop, push, reverse, shift, unshift}\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ecore\u003c/code\u003e object no longer available in the global version, entry points which previously returned it now returns \u003ccode\u003eglobalThis\u003c/code\u003e object. Also, don't set global \u003ccode\u003ecore\u003c/code\u003e property.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdd some missing entry points.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eTools, tests, code quality:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003ecore-js-compat\u003c/code\u003e package with:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eData about the necessity of \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e modules and API for getting a list of required \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e modules by \u003ccode\u003ebrowserslist\u003c/code\u003e query, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/466\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/466/hovercard\"\u003e#466\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eData which modules load by each entry point (mainly useful for tools like \u003ccode\u003e@babel/preset-env\u003c/code\u003e).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eData which modules added in minor versions (mainly useful for tools like \u003ccode\u003e@babel/preset-env\u003c/code\u003e).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ecore-js-builder\u003c/code\u003e package:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003etargets\u003c/code\u003e option with \u003ccode\u003ebrowserslist\u003c/code\u003e query.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved an option for generation bundle of a version without global namespace pollution - now it's an odd use case.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved UMD wrapper from a generated code of bundles - we don't need it for a global polyfill.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eGetting rid of LiveScript\u003c/strong\u003e, usage another language in JS standard library looks strange and impedes usage of tools like ESLint:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eTests are rewritten to JS.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eScripts are rewritten to JS.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBabel with minimalistic config (which should work anywhere) used on tests.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eESLint used on tests and tools.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSource code refactored for improving readability.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.5\"\u003e2.6.5 - 2019.02.15\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/h5\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-265---20190215\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.6.5 - 2019.02.15\" href=\"#265---20190215\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed buggy \u003ccode\u003eString#padStart\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eString#padEnd\u003c/code\u003e mobile Safari implementations, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/414\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/414/hovercard\"\u003e#414\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.4\"\u003e2.6.4 - 2019.02.07\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/h5\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-264---20190207\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.6.4 - 2019.02.07\" href=\"#264---20190207\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a workaround against crushing an old IE11.0.9600.16384 build, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/485\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/485/hovercard\"\u003e#485\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.3\"\u003e2.6.3 - 2019.01.22\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/h5\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-263---20190122\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.6.3 - 2019.01.22\" href=\"#263---20190122\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a workaround for \u003ccode\u003ebabel-minify\u003c/code\u003e bug, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/479\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/479/hovercard\"\u003e#479\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.2\"\u003e2.6.2 - href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2014-09/sept-25.md#510-globalasap-for-enqueuing-a-microtask\"\u003estage 0 proposal\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded well-known symbol \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.asyncIterator\u003c/code\u003e for \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-async-iteration\"\u003estage 2 async iteration proposal\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded well-known symbol \u003ccode\u003eSymbol.observable\u003c/code\u003e for \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zenparsing/es-observable\"\u003estage 1 observables proposal\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#{padStart, padEnd}\u003c/code\u003e returns original string if filler is empty string, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-03/march-29.md#stringprototypepadstartpadend\"\u003eTC39 meeting notes\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.values\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eObject.entries\u003c/code\u003e moved to stage 4 from 3, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-03/march-29.md#objectvalues--objectentries\"\u003eTC39 meeting notes\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSystem.global\u003c/code\u003e moved to stage 2 from 1, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-03/march-29.md#systemglobal\"\u003eTC39 meeting notes\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap#toJSON\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eSet#toJSON\u003c/code\u003e rejected and will be removed from the next major release, notes\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eError.isError\u003c/code\u003e withdrawn and will be removed from the next major release, \u003ca \u003ccode\u003ePromise\u003c/code\u003e improvements:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFeature detection:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAdded detection unhandled rejection tracking support - now it's available everywhere\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/140\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/140/hovercard\"\u003e#140\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded detection \u003ccode\u003e@@species\u003c/code\u003e pattern support for completely correct subclassing\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved usage \u003ccode\u003eObject.setPrototypeOf\u003c/code\u003e from feature detection and noisy console message about it in FF\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ePromise.all\u003c/code\u003e fixed for some very specific cases\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.1.0\"\u003e2.1.0 - 2016.02.09\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/h5\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-210---20160209\" 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAPI\u003c/strong\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eES5 polyfills are split and logic, used in other polyfills, moved to internal modules\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAll entry point works in ES3 environment like IE8- without \u003ccode\u003ecore-js/(library/)es5\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAdded all missed single entry points for ES5 polyfills\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSeparated ES5 polyfills moved to the ES6 namespace. Why?\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMainly, for prevent duplication features in different namespaces - logic of most required ES5 polyfills changed in ES6+:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAlready added changes for: \u003ccode\u003eObject\u003c/code\u003e statics - should accept primitives, new whitespaces lists in \u003ccode\u003eString#trim\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eparse(Int|float)\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eRegExp#toString\u003c/code\u003e logic, \u003ccode\u003eString#split\u003c/code\u003e, etc\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eShould be changed in the future: \u003ccode\u003e@@species\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eToLength\u003c/code\u003e logic in \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e methods, \u003ccode\u003eDate\u003c/code\u003e parsing, \u003ccode\u003eFunction#bind\u003c/code\u003e, etc\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eShould not be changed only several features like \u003ccode\u003eArray.isArray\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eDate.now\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome ES5 polyfills required for modern engines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAll old entry points should work fine, but in the next major release API can be changed\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eObject.getOwnPropertyDescriptors\u003c/code\u003e moved to the stage 3, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-01/2016-01-28.md#objectgetownpropertydescriptors-to-stage-3-jordan-harband-low-priority-but-super-quick\"\u003eJanuary TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eumd\u003c/code\u003e option for \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#custom-build-from-external-scripts\"\u003ecustom build process\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/169\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/169/hovercard\"\u003e#169\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReturned entry points for \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e statics, removed in \u003ccode\u003e2.0\u003c/code\u003e, for compatibility with \u003ccode\u003ebabel\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e6\u003c/code\u003e and for future fixes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDeprecated\u003c/strong\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.enumerate\u003c/code\u003e deprecated and will be removed from the next major release, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-01/2016-01-28.md#5xix-revisit-proxy-enumerate---revisit-decision-to-exhaust-iterator\"\u003eJanuary TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eNew Features\u003c/strong\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://rbuckton.github.io/reflect-metadata/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect\u003c/code\u003e metadata API\u003c/a\u003e as a pre-strawman feature, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/152\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/152/hovercard\"\u003e#152\u003c/a\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.defineMetadata\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.deleteMetadata\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.getMetadata\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.getMetadataKeys\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.getOwnMetadata\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.getOwnMetadataKeys\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.hasMetadata\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.hasOwnMetadata\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.metadata\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImplementation / fixes \u003ccode\u003eDate#toJSON\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixes for \u003ccode\u003eparseInt\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eNumber.parseInt\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixes for \u003ccode\u003eparseFloat\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eNumber.parseFloat\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixes for \u003ccode\u003eRegExp#toString\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixes for \u003ccode\u003eArray#sort\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixes for \u003ccode\u003eNumber#toFixed\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixes for \u003ccode\u003eNumber#toPrecision\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdditional fixes for \u003ccode\u003eString#split\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ccode\u003eRegExp#@@split\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eImprovements\u003c/strong\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCorrect subclassing wrapped collections, \u003ccode\u003eNumber\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eRegExp\u003c/code\u003e constructors with native class syntax\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCorrect support \u003ccode\u003eSharedArrayBuffer\u003c/code\u003e and buffers from other realms in typed arrays wrappers\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdditional validations for \u003ccode\u003eObject.{defineProperty, getOwnPropertyDescriptor}\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eReflect.defineProperty\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eBug Fixes\u003c/strong\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed some cases \u003ccode\u003eArray#lastIndexOf\u003c/code\u003e with negative second argument\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" \u003ccode\u003eUint8Array\u003c/code\u003e constructor wrapper. Reason - \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/websockets/ws/pull/645\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/websockets/ws/pull/645/hovercard\"\u003ebug in \u003ccode\u003ews\u003c/code\u003e module\u003c/a\u003e (-\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003esocket.io\u003c/code\u003e) which passes to \u003ccode\u003eBuffer\u003c/code\u003e constructor -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eUint8Array\u003c/code\u003e float and uses \u003ca href=\"https://code.google.com/p/v8/issues/detail?id=4552\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ethe \u003ccode\u003eV8\u003c/code\u003e bug\u003c/a\u003e for conversion to int (by the spec should be thrown an error). \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/karma-runner/karma/issues/1768\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/karma-runner/karma/issues/1768/hovercard\"\u003eIt creates problems for many people.\u003c/a\u003e I hope, it will be returned after fixing this bug in \u003ccode\u003eV8\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-typed-arrays\"\u003eTyped Arrays\u003c/a\u003e-related features\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer.isView\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eArrayBuffer#slice\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDataView\u003c/code\u003e with all getter / setter methods\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eInt8Array\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eUint8Array\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eUint8ClampedArray\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eInt16Array\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eUint16Array\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eInt32Array\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eUint32Array\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eFloat32Array\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eFloat64Array\u003c/code\u003e constructors\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%.{for, of}\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e%TypedArray%#{copyWithin, every, fill, filter, find, findIndex, forEach, indexOf, includes, join, lastIndexOf, map, reduce, reduceRight, reverse, set, slice, some, sort, subarray, values, keys, entries, @@iterator, ...}\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eSystem.global\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-global\"\u003eproposal\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-19.md#systemglobal-jhd\"\u003eNovember TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eError.isError\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/ljharb/proposal-is-error\"\u003eproposal\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-19.md#jhd-erroriserror\"\u003eNovember TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMath.{iaddh, isubh, imulh, umulh}\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://gist.github.com/BrendanEich/4294d5c212a6d2254703\"\u003eproposal\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eRegExp.escape\u003c/code\u003e moved from the \u003ccode\u003ees7\u003c/code\u003e to the non-standard \u003ccode\u003ecore\u003c/code\u003e namespace, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-07/july-28.md#62-regexpescape\"\u003eJuly TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e - too slow, but it's condition of stability, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/116\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/116/hovercard\"\u003e#116\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-promise\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003ePromise\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome performance optimisations\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded basic support \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#unhandled-rejection-tracking\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003erejectionHandled\u003c/code\u003e event / \u003ccode\u003eonrejectionhandled\u003c/code\u003e handler\u003c/a\u003e to the polyfill\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved usage \u003ccode\u003e@@species\u003c/code\u003e from \u003ccode\u003ePromise.{all, race}\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-18.md#conclusionresolution-2\"\u003eNovember TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome improvements \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-collections\"\u003ecollections polyfills\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eO(1)\u003c/code\u003e and preventing possible leaks with frozen keys, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/134\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/134/hovercard\"\u003e#134\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCorrect observable state object keys\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRenamed \u003ccode\u003eString#{padLeft, padRight}\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#{padStart, padEnd}\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-pad-start-end\"\u003eproposal\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-17.md#conclusionresolution-2\"\u003eNovember TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e (they want to rename it on each meeting?O_o), \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/132\" data-hovercard-type=\"pull_request\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/pull/132/hovercard\"\u003e#132\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#{trimStart, trimEnd}\u003c/code\u003e as aliases for \u003ccode\u003eString#{trimLeft, trimRight}\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/sebmarkbage/ecmascript-string-left-right-trim\"\u003eproposal\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-17.md#conclusionresolution-2\"\u003eNovember TC39 meeting\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-string\"\u003eannex B HTML methods\u003c/a\u003e - ugly, but also \u003ca href=\"https://262.ecma-international.org/6.0/#sec-string.prototype.anchor\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ethe part of the spec\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded little fix for \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-date\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eDate#toString\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e - \u003ccode\u003enew Date(NaN).toString()\u003c/code\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://262.ecma-international.org/6.0/#sec-todatestring\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eshould be \u003ccode\u003e'Invalid Date'\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#iterable-dom-collections\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e{keys, values, entries, @@iterator}\u003c/code\u003e methods to DOM collections\u003c/a\u003e which should have \u003ca href=\"https://heycam.github.io/webidl/#idl-iterable\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eiterable interface\u003c/a\u003e or should be \u003ca href=\"https://heycam.github.io/webidl/#LegacyArrayClass\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003einherited from \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e - \u003ccode\u003eNodeList\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eDOMTokenList\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eMediaList\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eStyleSheetList\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eCSSRuleList\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved Mozilla \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e generics - \u003ca href=\"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Array#Array_generic_methods\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003edeprecated and will be removed from FF\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://web.archive.org/web/20160805230354/http://wiki.ecmascript.org/doku.php?id=strawman:array_statics\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003elooks like strawman is dead\u003c/a\u003e, available \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/plusdude/array-generics\"\u003ealternative shim\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved \u003ccode\u003ecore.log\u003c/code\u003e module\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCommonJS API\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded entry points for \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#commonjs-and-prototype-methods-without-global-namespace-pollution\"\u003evirtual methods\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded entry points for \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals\"\u003estages proposals\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSome other minor changes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#custom-build-from-external-scripts\"\u003eCustom build from external scripts\u003c/a\u003e moved to the separate package for preventing problems with dependencies\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged \u003ccode\u003e$\u003c/code\u003e prefix for internal modules file names because Team Foundation Server does not support it, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/129\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/129/hovercard\"\u003e#129\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdditional fix for \u003ccode\u003eSameValueZero\u003c/code\u003e in V8 ~ Chromium 39-42 collections\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdditional fix for FF27 \u003ccode\u003eArray\u003c/code\u003e iterator\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved usage shortcuts for \u003ccode\u003earguments\u003c/code\u003e object - old WebKit bug, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/150\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/150/hovercard\"\u003e#150\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e{Map, Set}#forEach\u003c/code\u003e non-generic, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/144\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/144/hovercard\"\u003e#144\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMany other improvements\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv proposal\u003c/a\u003e - renamed, minor internal changes:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#lpad\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eString#padLeft\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#rpad\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003eString#padRight\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ca href=\"#ecmascript-7-proposals\"\u003estring trim functions\u003c/a\u003e - \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/sebmarkbage/ecmascript-string-left-right-trim\"\u003eproposal\u003c/a\u003e, defacto standard - required only for IE11- and fixed for some old engines:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#trimLeft\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#trimRight\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-string\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eString#trim\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e fixed for some engines by es6 spec and moved from \u003ccode\u003ees5\u003c/code\u003e to single \u003ccode\u003ees6\u003c/code\u003e module\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSplit \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-object\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003ees6.object.statics-accept-primitives\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCaps for \u003ccode\u003efreeze\u003c/code\u003e-family \u003ccode\u003eObject\u003c/code\u003e methods moved from \u003ccode\u003ees5\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003ees6\u003c/code\u003e namespace and joined with \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-object\"\u003ees6 wrappers\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ees5\u003c/code\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#commonjs\"\u003enamespace\u003c/a\u003e also includes modules, moved to \u003ccode\u003ees6\u003c/code\u003e namespace - you can use it as before\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIncreased \u003ccode\u003eMessageChannel\u003c/code\u003e priority in \u003ccode\u003e$.task\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/95\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/95/hovercard\"\u003e#95\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDoes not get \u003ccode\u003eglobal.Symbol\u003c/code\u003e on each getting iterator, if you wanna use alternative \u003ccode\u003eSymbol\u003c/code\u003e shim - add it before \u003ccode\u003ecore-js\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-reflect\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.construct\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e optimized and fixed for some href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-collections\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eMap\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eSet\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eWeakMap\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eWeakSet\u003c/code\u003e constructors\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-promise\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003ePromise.all\u003c/code\u003e, href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-array\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eArray.from\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e for default \u003ccode\u003eArray href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-iterators\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003ecore.getIteratorMethod\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e helper\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUses enumerable properties in shimmed instances - collections, iterators, etc for optimize performance\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support native constructors to \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-reflect\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eReflect.construct\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e with 2 arguments\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-collections\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eWeak\u003c/code\u003e-collections\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMaximum modularity, reduced optimizations\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFinal cleaning non-standard features\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMoved \u003ccode\u003e$for\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/forof\"\u003eseparate library\u003c/a\u003e. This work for syntax - \u003ccode\u003efor-of\u003c/code\u003e loop and comprehensions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMoved \u003ccode\u003eDate#{format, formatUTC}\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/dtf\"\u003eseparate library\u003c/a\u003e. Standard way for this - \u003ccode\u003eECMA-402\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved \u003ccode\u003eMath\u003c/code\u003e methods from \u003ccode\u003eNumber.prototype\u003c/code\u003e. Slight sugar for simple \u003ccode\u003eMath\u003c/code\u003e methods calling\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved \u003ccode\u003e{Array#, Array, Dict}.turn\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved \u003ccode\u003ecore.global\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUses \u003ccode\u003eToNumber\u003c/code\u003e instead of \u003ccode\u003eToLength\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#number-iterator\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eNumber Iterator\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eArray.from(2.5)\u003c/code\u003e will be \u003ccode\u003e[0, 1, 2]\u003c/code\u003e instead of \u003ccode\u003e[0, 1]\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/85\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/zloirock/core-js/issues/85/hovercard\"\u003e#85\u003c/a\u003e - invalid \u003ccode\u003ePromise\u003c/code\u003e unhandled rejection message in nested \u003ccode\u003esetTimeout\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/86\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#commonjs\"\u003eCommonJS API\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSplit and renamed some modules\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support ES3 environment (ES5 polyfill) to \u003cstrong\u003eall\u003c/strong\u003e default versions - size increases slightly (+ ~4kb w/o gzip), many issues disappear, if you don't need it - \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#commonjs\"\u003esimply include only required namespaces / features / modules\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zenparsing/es-abstract-refs\"\u003eabstract references\u003c/a\u003e support - proposal has been superseded =\\\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-iterators\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e$for.isIterable\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003ecore.isIterable\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e$for.getIterator\u003c/code\u003e -\u0026gt; \u003ccode\u003ecore.getIterator\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e, temporary available in old namespace\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed iterators support in v8 \u003ccode\u003ePromise.all\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003ePromise.race\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMany other fixes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ca changes","ghDesktopPath":null,"isGitLfs":false,"onBranch":false,"shortPath":"52a59b5","siteNavLoginPath":"/login?return_to=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fzloirock%2Fcore-js%2Fblob%2Fv3.32.2%2FCHANGELOG.md","isCSV":false,"isRichtext":true,"lineInfo":{"truncatedLoc":"2079","truncatedSloc":"1851"},"mode":"file"},"image":false,"isCodeownersFile":null,"isPlain":false,"isValidLegacyIssueTemplate":false,"isIssueTemplate":false,"isDiscussionTemplate":false,"language":"Markdown","languageID":222,"large":false,"planSupportInfo":{"repoIsFork":null,"repoOwnedByCurrentUser":null,"requestFullPath":"/zloirock/core-js/blob/v3.32.2/CHANGELOG.md","showFreeOrgGatedFeatureMessage":null,"showPlanSupportBanner":null,"upgradeDataAttributes":null,"upgradePath":null},"publishBannersInfo":{"dismissActionNoticePath":"/settings/dismiss-notice/publish_action_from_dockerfile","releasePath":"/zloirock/core-js/releases/new?marketplace=true","showPublishActionBanner":false},"rawBlobUrl":"https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/raw/refs/tags/v3.32.2/CHANGELOG.md","renderImageOrRaw":false,"shortPath":null,"symbolsEnabled":true,"tabSize":4,"topBannersInfo":{"overridingGlobalFundingFile":false,"globalPreferredFundingPath":null,"showInvalidCitationWarning":false,"citationHelpUrl":"https://docs.github.com/github/creating-cloning-and-archiving-repositories/creating-a-repository-on-github/about-citation-files","actionsOnboardingTip":null},"truncated":false,"viewable":true,"workflowRedirectUrl":null},"copilotInfo":null,"copilotAccessAllowed":false,"copilotSpacesEnabled":false,"modelsAccessAllowed":false,"modelsRepoIntegrationEnabled":false,"isMarketplaceEnabled":true},"codeViewBlobLayoutRoute.StyledBlob":{"rawLines":["## Changelog","##### Unreleased","- Nothing","","##### [3.32.2 - 2023.09.07](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.32.2)","- Fixed `structuredClone` feature detection `core-js@3.32.1` bug, [#1288](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1288)","- Added a workaround of old WebKit + `eval` bug, [#1287](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/pull/1287)","- Compat data improvements:","  - Added Samsung Internet 23 compat data mapping","  - Added Quest Browser 29 compat data mapping","","##### [3.32.1 - 2023.08.19](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.32.1)","- Fixed some cases of IEEE754 rounding, [#1279](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1279), thanks [**@petamoriken**](https://github.com/petamoriken)","- Prevented injection `process` polyfill to `core-js` via some bundlers or `esm.sh`, [#1277](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1277)","- Some minor fixes and stylistic changes","- Compat data improvements:","  - [`Promise.withResolvers`](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-with-resolvers) marked as supported [from Bun 0.7.1](https://bun.sh/blog/bun-v0.7.1#bun-ismainthread-and-promise-withresolvers)","  - Added Opera Android 77 compat data mapping","  - Updated Electron 27 compat data mapping","","##### [3.32.0 - 2023.07.28](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.32.0)","- [`Array` grouping proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-grouping), July 2023 TC39 meeting updates:","  - [Moved back to stage 3](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-grouping/issues/54)","  - Added `/actual/` namespaces entries, unconditional forced replacement changed to feature detection","- [`Promise.withResolvers` proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-with-resolvers), July 2023 TC39 meeting updates:","  - [Moved to stage 3](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-with-resolvers/pull/18)","  - Added `/actual/` namespaces entries, unconditional forced replacement changed to feature detection","- [`Set` methods stage 3 proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-set-methods), July 2023 TC39 meeting updates:","  - Throw on negative `Set` sizes, [proposal-set-methods/88](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-set-methods/pull/88)","  - Removed `IsCallable` check in `GetKeysIterator`, [proposal-set-methods/101](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-set-methods/pull/101)","- [Iterator Helpers stage 3 proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers):","  - Avoid creating observable `String` wrapper objects, July 2023 TC39 meeting update, [proposal-iterator-helpers/281](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/281)","  - `Iterator` is not constructible from the active function object (works as an abstract class)","- Async explicit resource management:","  - Moved back into [the initial proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management) -\u003e moved to stage 3, [proposal-explicit-resource-management/154](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management/pull/154)","  - Added `/actual/` namespace entries, unconditional forced replacement changed to feature detection","  - Ignore return value of `[@@dispose]()` method when hint is `async-dispose`, [proposal-explicit-resource-management/180](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management/pull/180)","  - Added ticks for empty resources, [proposal-explicit-resource-management/163](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-explicit-resource-management/pull/163)","- Added some methods from [`Float16Array` stage 3 proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-float16array):","  - There are some reason why I don't want to add `Float16Array` right now, however, make sense to add some methods from this proposal.","  - Methods:","    - `Math.f16round`","    - `DataView.prototype.getFloat16`","    - `DataView.prototype.setFloat16`","- Added [`DataView` get / set `Uint8Clamped` methods stage 1 proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-dataview-get-set-uint8clamped):","  - Methods:","    - `DataView.prototype.getUint8Clamped`","    - `DataView.prototype.setUint8Clamped`","- Used strict mode in some missed cases, [#1269](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1269)","- Fixed [a Chromium 117 bug](https://bugs.chromium.org/p/v8/issues/detail?id=14222) in `value` argument of `URLSearchParams.prototype.{ has, delete }`","- Fixed early WebKit ~ Safari 17.0 beta `Set` methods implementation by the actual spec","- Fixed incorrect `Symbol.{ dispose, asyncDispose }` descriptors from [NodeJS 20.4](https://github.com/nodejs/node/issues/48699) / transpilers helpers / userland code","- Fixed forced polyfilling of some iterator helpers that should return wrapped iterator in the pure version","- Fixed and exposed [`AsyncIteratorPrototype` `core-js/configurator` option](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#asynciterator-helpers), [#1268](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1268)","- Compat data improvements:","  - Sync [`Iterator` helpers proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers) features marked as [supported](https://chromestatus.com/feature/5102502917177344) from V8 ~ Chrome 117","  - [`Array` grouping proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-grouping) features marked as [supported](https://chromestatus.com/feature/5714791975878656) from V8 ~ Chrome 117","  - Mark `Symbol.{ dispose, asyncDispose }` as supported from NodeJS 20.5.0 (as mentioned above, NodeJS 20.4.0 add it, but [with incorrect descriptors](https://github.com/nodejs/node/issues/48699))","  - Added Electron 27 compat data mapping","","##### [3.31.1 - 2023.07.06](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.31.1)","- Fixed a `structuredClone` bug with cloning views of transferred buffers, [#1265](https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/1265)","- Fixed the order of arguments validation in `DataView` methods","- Allowed cloning of [`Float16Array`](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-float16array) in `structuredClone`","- Compat data improvements:","  - [`Set` methods proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-set-methods) marked as [supported from Safari 17.0](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/safari-release-notes/safari-17-release-notes#JavaScript)","  - New `URL` features: [`URL.canParse`](https://url.spec.whatwg.org/#dom-url-canparse), [`URLSearchParams.prototype.size`](https://url.spec.whatwg.org/#dom-urlsearchparams-size) and [`value` argument of `URLSearchParams.prototype.{ has, delete }`](https://url.spec.whatwg.org/#dom-urlsearchparams-delete) marked as [supported from Safari 17.0](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/safari-release-notes/safari-17-release-notes#Web-API)","  - `value` argument of `URLSearchParams.prototype.{ has, delete }` marked as supported from [Deno 1.35](https://github.com/denoland/deno/pull/19654)","  - `AggregateError` and well-formed `JSON.stringify` marked as [supported React Native 0.72
