<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.16.0">3.16.0 - 2021.07.30</a></h5><a id="user-content-3160---20210730" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.16.0 - 2021.07.30" href="#3160---20210730"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-find-from-last"><code>Array</code> find from last proposal</a> moved to the stage 3, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-find-from-last/pull/47" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-array-find-from-last/pull/47/hovercard">July 2021 TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-filtering"><code>Array</code> filtering stage 1 proposal</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Array.prototype.filterReject</code> replaces <code>Array.prototype.filterOut</code></li>
<li><code>%TypedArray%.prototype.filterReject</code> replaces <code>%TypedArray%.prototype.filterOut</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-grouping"><code>Array</code> grouping stage 1 proposal</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Array.prototype.groupBy</code></li>
<li><code>%TypedArray%.prototype.groupBy</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Work with symbols made stricter: some missed before cases of methods that should throw an error on symbols now works as they should</li>
<li>Handling <code>@@toPrimitive</code> in some cases of <code>ToPrimitive</code> internal logic made stricter</li>
<li>Fixed work of <code>Request</code> with polyfilled <code>URLSearchParams</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/965" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/965/hovercard">#965</a></li>
<li>Fixed possible exposing of collections elements metadata in some cases, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/427" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/427/hovercard">#427</a></li>
<li>Fixed crashing of <code>Object.create(null)</code> on WSH, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/966" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/966/hovercard">#966</a></li>
<li>Fixed some cases of typed arrays subclassing logic</li>
<li>Fixed a minor bug related to string conversion in <code>RegExp#exec</code></li>
<li>Fixed <code>Date.prototype.getYear</code> feature detection</li>
<li>Fixed content of some entry points</li>
<li>Some minor optimizations and refactoring</li>
<li>Deno:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added Deno support (sure, after bundling since Deno does not support CommonJS)</li>
<li>Allowed <code>deno</code> target in <code>core-js-compat</code> / <code>core-js-builder</code></li>
<li>A bundle for Deno published on <a href="https://deno.land/x/corejs" rel="nofollow">deno.land/x/corejs</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added / updated compat data / mapping:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Deno 1.0-1.13</li>
<li>NodeJS up to 16.6</li>
<li>iOS Safari up to 15.0</li>
<li>Samsung Internet up to 15.0</li>
<li>Opera Android up to 64</li>
<li><code>Object.hasOwn</code> marked as supported from <a href="https://chromestatus.com/feature/5662263404920832" rel="nofollow">V8 9.3</a> and <a href="https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1721149" rel="nofollow">FF92</a></li>
<li><code>Date.prototype.getYear</code> marked as not supported in IE8-</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <code>summary</code> option to <code>core-js-builder</code>, see more info in the <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/blob/master/packages/core-js-builder/README.md"><code>README</code></a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/910" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/910/hovercard">#910</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.15.2">3.15.2 - 2021.06.29</a></h5><a id="user-content-3152---20210629" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.15.2 - 2021.06.29" href="#3152---20210629"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Worked around breakage related to <code>zone.js</code> loaded before <code>core-js</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/953" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/953/hovercard">#953</a></li>
<li>Added NodeJS 16.4 -&gt; Chrome 91 compat data mapping</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.15.1">3.15.1 - 2021.06.23</a></h5><a id="user-content-3151---20210623" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.15.1 - 2021.06.23" href="#3151---20210623"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed cloning of regex through <code>RegExp</code> constructor, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/948" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/948/hovercard">#948</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.15.0">3.15.0 - 2021.06.21</a></h5><a id="user-content-3150---20210621" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.15.0 - 2021.06.21" href="#3150---20210621"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>RegExp</code> named capture groups polyfill, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/521" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/521/hovercard">#521</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/944" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/944/hovercard">#944</a></li>
<li>Added <code>RegExp</code> <code>dotAll</code> flag polyfill, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/792" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/792/hovercard">#792</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/944" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/944/hovercard">#944</a></li>
<li>Added missed polyfills of <a href="https://tc39.es/ecma262/#sec-additional-built-in-properties" rel="nofollow">Annex B</a> features (required mainly for some non-browser engines), <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/336" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/336/hovercard">#336</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/945" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/945/hovercard">#945</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>escape</code></li>
<li><code>unescape</code></li>
<li><code>String.prototype.substr</code></li>
<li><code>Date.prototype.getYear</code></li>
<li><code>Date.prototype.setYear</code></li>
<li><code>Date.prototype.toGMTString</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Fixed detection of forbidden host code points in <code>URL</code> polyfill</li>
<li>Allowed <code>rhino</code> target in <code>core-js-compat</code> / <code>core-js-builder</code>, added compat data for <code>rhino</code> 1.7.13, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/942" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/942/hovercard">#942</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/gausie">@gausie</a></li>
<li><code>.at</code> marked as supported from FF90</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.14.0">3.14.0 - 2021.06.05</a></h5><a id="user-content-3140---20210605" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.14.0 - 2021.06.05" href="#3140---20210605"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added polyfill of stable sort in <code>{ Array, %TypedArray% }.prototype.sort</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/769" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/769/hovercard">#769</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/941" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/941/hovercard">#941</a></li>
<li>Fixed <code>Safari</code> 14.0- <code>%TypedArray%.prototype.sort</code> validation of arguments bug</li>
<li><code>.at</code> marked as supported from V8 9.2</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.13.1">3.13.1 - 2021.05.29</a></h5><a id="user-content-3131---20210529" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.13.1 - 2021.05.29" href="#3131---20210529"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Overwrites <code>get-own-property-symbols</code> third-party <code>Symbol</code> polyfill if it's used since it causes a stack overflow, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/774" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/774/hovercard">#774</a></li>
<li>Added a workaround of possible browser crash on <code>Object.prototype</code> accessors methods in WebKit ~ Android 4.0, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/232" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/232/hovercard">#232</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.13.0">3.13.0 - 2021.05.26</a></h5><a id="user-content-3130---20210526" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.13.0 - 2021.05.26" href="#3130---20210526"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Accessible <code>Object#hasOwnProperty</code> (<code>Object.hasOwn</code>) proposal moved to the stage 3, <a href="https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/74#issuecomment-848121673" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/babel/proposals/issues/74/hovercard">May 2021 TC39 meeting</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.12.1">3.12.1 - 2021.05.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-3121---20210509" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.12.1 - 2021.05.09" href="#3121---20210509"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed some cases of <code>Function#toString</code> with multiple <code>core-js</code> instances</li>
<li>Fixed some possible <code>String#split</code> polyfill problems in V8 5.1</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.12.0">3.12.0 - 2021.05.06</a></h5><a id="user-content-3120---20210506" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.12.0 - 2021.05.06" href="#3120---20210506"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added well-known symbol <code>Symbol.metadata</code> for <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-decorators">decorators stage 2 proposal</a></li>
<li>Added well-known symbol <code>Symbol.matcher</code> for <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-pattern-matching">pattern matching stage 1 proposal</a></li>
<li>Fixed regression of V8 ~ Node 0.12 <code>String(Symbol())</code> bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/933" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/933/hovercard">#933</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.11.3">3.11.3 - 2021.05.05</a></h5><a id="user-content-3113---20210505" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.11.3 - 2021.05.05" href="#3113---20210505"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Native promise-based APIs <code>Promise#{ catch, finally }</code> returns polyfilled <code>Promise</code> instances when it's required</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.11.2">3.11.2 - 2021.05.03</a></h5><a id="user-content-3112---20210503" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.11.2 - 2021.05.03" href="#3112---20210503"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added a workaround of WebKit ~ iOS 10.3 Safari <code>Promise</code> bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/932" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/932/hovercard">#932</a></li>
<li><code>Promise#then</code> of incorrect native <code>Promise</code> implementations with correct subclassing no longer wrapped</li>
<li>Changed the order of <code>Promise</code> feature detection, removed unhandled rejection tracking check in non-browser non-node platforms</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.11.1">3.11.1 - 2021.04.28</a></h5><a id="user-content-3111---20210428" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.11.1 - 2021.04.28" href="#3111---20210428"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Made <code>instanceof Promise</code> and <code>.constructor === Promise</code> work with polyfilled <code>Promise</code> for all native promise-based APIs</li>
<li>Added a workaround for some buggy V8 versions ~4.5 related to fixing of <code>%TypedArray%</code> static methods, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/564" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/564/hovercard">#564</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.11.0">3.11.0 - 2021.04.22</a></h5><a id="user-content-3110---20210422" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.11.0 - 2021.04.22" href="#3110---20210422"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-accessible-object-hasownproperty">accessible <code>Object#hasOwnProperty</code> stage 2 proposal</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Object.hasOwn</code> method</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Fixed a possible <code>RegExp</code> constructor problem with multiple global <code>core-js</code> instances</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.10.2">3.10.2 - 2021.04.19</a></h5><a id="user-content-3102---20210419" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.10.2 - 2021.04.19" href="#3102---20210419"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>URL</code> and <code>URLSearchParams</code> marked as supported from Safari 14.0</li>
<li>Polyfilled built-in constructors protected from calling on instances</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.10.1">3.10.1 - 2021.04.08</a></h5><a id="user-content-3101---20210408" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.10.1 - 2021.04.08" href="#3101---20210408"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Prevented possible <code>RegExp#split</code> problems in old engines, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/751" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/751/hovercard">#751</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/919" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/919/hovercard">#919</a></li>
<li>Detection of Safari 10 string padding bug extended to some Safari-based browsers</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.10.0">3.10.0 - 2021.03.31</a></h5><a id="user-content-3100---20210331" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.10.0 - 2021.03.31" href="#3100---20210331"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-find-from-last"><code>Array</code> find from last proposal</a> moved to the stage 2, <a href="https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/71#issuecomment-795916535" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/babel/proposals/issues/71/hovercard">March TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li>Prevented possible <code>RegExp#exec</code> problems in some old engines, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/920" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/920/hovercard">#920</a></li>
<li>Updated compat data mapping:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>NodeJS up to 16.0</li>
<li>Electron up to 13.0</li>
<li>Samsung Internet up to 14.0</li>
<li>Opera Android up to 62</li>
<li>The rest automatically</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.9.1">3.9.1 - 2021.03.01</a></h5><a id="user-content-391---20210301" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.9.1 - 2021.03.01" href="#391---20210301"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added a workaround for Chrome 38-40 bug which does not allow to inherit symbols (incl. well-known) from DOM collections prototypes to instances, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/37" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/37/hovercard">#37</a></li>
<li>Used <code>NumericRangeIterator</code> as toStringTag instead of <code>RangeIterator</code> in <code>{ Number, BigInt }.range</code> iterator, per <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-Number.range/pull/46" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-iterator.range/pull/46/hovercard">this PR</a></li>
<li>TypedArray constructors marked as supported from Safari 14.0</li>
<li>Updated compat data mapping for iOS Safari and Opera for Android</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.9.0">3.9.0 - 2021.02.19</a></h5><a id="user-content-390---20210219" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.9.0 - 2021.02.19" href="#390---20210219"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-find-from-last"><code>Array</code> find from last stage 1 proposal</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Array#findLast</code></li>
<li><code>Array#findLastIndex</code></li>
<li><code>%TypedArray%#findLast</code></li>
<li><code>%TypedArray%#findLastIndex</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <code>%TypedArray%#uniqueBy</code> method for <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-unique">array deduplication stage 1 proposal</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>%TypedArray%#uniqueBy</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Dropped <code>ToLength</code> detection from array methods feature detection which could cause hanging FF11-21 and some versions of old WebKit, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/764" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/764/hovercard">#764</a></li>
<li>Minified bundle from <code>core-js-bundle</code> uses <code>terser</code> instead of <code>uglify-js</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.8.3">3.8.3 - 2021.01.19</a></h5><a id="user-content-383---20210119" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.8.3 - 2021.01.19" href="#383---20210119"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed some more issues related to FF44- legacy <code>Iterator</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/906" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/906/hovercard">#906</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.8.2">3.8.2 - 2021.01.03</a></h5><a id="user-content-382---20210103" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.8.2 - 2021.01.03" href="#382---20210103"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed handling of special replacements patterns in <code>String#replaceAll</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/900" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/900/hovercard">#900</a></li>
<li>Fixed iterators dependencies of <code>Promise.any</code> and <code>Promise.allSettled</code> entries</li>
<li>Fixed microtask implementation on WebOS, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/898" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/898/hovercard">#898</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/901" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/901/hovercard">#901</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.8.1">3.8.1 - 2020.12.06</a></h5><a id="user-content-381---20201206" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.8.1 - 2020.12.06" href="#381---20201206"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed work of new <code>%TypedArray%</code> methods on <code>BigInt</code> arrays</li>
<li>Added ESNext methods to ES3 workaround for <code>Number</code> constructor wrapper</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.8.0">3.8.0 - 2020.11.26</a></h5><a id="user-content-380---20201126" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.8.0 - 2020.11.26" href="#380---20201126"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-relative-indexing-method">relative indexing method stage 3 proposal</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Array#at</code></li>
<li><code>%TypedArray%#at</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-Number.range"><code>Number.range</code> stage 1 proposal</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Number.range</code></li>
<li><code>BigInt.range</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-filtering">array filtering stage 1 proposal</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Array#filterOut</code></li>
<li><code>%TypedArray%#filterOut</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-unique">array deduplication stage 1 proposal</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Array#uniqueBy</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added code points / code units explicit feature detection in <code>String#at</code> for preventing breakage code which use obsolete <code>String#at</code> proposal polyfill</li>
<li>Added the missed <code>(es|stable)/instance/replace-all</code> entries</li>
<li>Updated compat data mapping for Opera - from Opera 69, the difference with Chrome versions increased to 14</li>
<li>Compat data mapping for modern Android WebView to Chrome moved from targets parser directly to compat data</li>
<li>Deprecate <code>core-js-builder</code> <code>blacklist</code> option in favor of <code>exclude</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.12">2.6.12 [LEGACY] - 2020.11.26</a></h5><a id="user-content-2612-legacy---20201126" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.12 [LEGACY] - 2020.11.26" href="#2612-legacy---20201126"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added code points / code units explicit feature detection in <code>String#at</code> for preventing breakage code which use obsolete <code>String#at</code> proposal polyfill</li>
<li>Added <code>OPEN_SOURCE_CONTRIBUTOR</code> detection in <code>postinstall</code></li>
<li>Added Drone CI detection in <code>postinstall</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.7.0">3.7.0 - 2020.11.06</a></h5><a id="user-content-370---20201106" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.7.0 - 2020.11.06" href="#370---20201106"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>String#replaceAll</code> moved to the stable ES, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/master/meetings/2020-06/june-2.md#stringprototypereplaceall-for-stage-4">per June TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li><code>Promise.any</code> and <code>AggregateError</code> moved to the stable ES, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/master/meetings/2020-07/july-21.md#promiseany--aggregateerror-for-stage-4">per July TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect[@@toStringTag]</code>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/2057" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/ecma262/pull/2057/hovercard">per July TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li>Forced replacement of <code>Array#{ reduce, reduceRight }</code> in Chrome 80-82 because of <a href="https://bugs.chromium.org/p/chromium/issues/detail?id=1049982" rel="nofollow">a bug</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/766" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/766/hovercard">#766</a></li>
<li>Following the changes in <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-upsert">the <code>upsert</code> proposal</a>, <code>{ Map, WeakMap }#emplace</code> replace <code>{ Map, WeakMap }#upsert</code>, these obsolete methods will be removed in the next major release</li>
<li><a href="https://tc39.es/ecma262/#sec-aggregate-error-constructor" rel="nofollow">By the current spec</a>, <code>AggregateError#errors</code> is own data property</li>
<li>Added correct iteration closing in the iteration helpers according to the current version of <a href="https://tc39.es/proposal-iterator-helpers" rel="nofollow">the proposal</a></li>
<li><code>process.nextTick</code> have a less priority than <code>Promise</code> in the microtask implementation, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/855" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/855/hovercard">#855</a></li>
<li>Fixed microtask implementation in engines with <code>MutationObserver</code>, but without <code>document</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/865" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/865/hovercard">#865</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/866" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/866/hovercard">#866</a></li>
<li>Fixed <code>core-js-builder</code> with an empty (after the targets engines or another filtration) modules list, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/822" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/822/hovercard">#822</a></li>
<li>Fixed possible twice call of <code>window.onunhandledrejection</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/760" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/760/hovercard">#760</a></li>
<li>Fixed some possible problems related multiple global copies of <code>core-js</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/880" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/880/hovercard">#880</a></li>
<li>Added a workaround for 3rd party <code>Reflect.set</code> polyfill bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/847" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/847/hovercard">#847</a></li>
<li>Updated compat data:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Chrome up to 86</li>
<li>FF up to 82</li>
<li>Safari up to 14</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Updated compat data mapping:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>iOS up to 14</li>
<li>NodeJS up to 15.0</li>
<li>Electron up to 11.0</li>
<li>Samsung Internet up to 13.0</li>
<li>Opera Android up to 60</li>
<li>The rest automatically</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Updated all required dependencies</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.6.5">3.6.5 - 2020.04.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-365---20200409" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.6.5 - 2020.04.09" href="#365---20200409"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Updated Browserslist <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/755" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/755/hovercard">#755</a></li>
<li>Fixed <code>setImmediate</code> in Safari <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/770" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/770/hovercard">#770</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/dtinth">@dtinth</a></li>
<li>Fixed some regexp, thanks <a href="https://github.com/scottarc">@scottarc</a></li>
<li>Added OPEN_SOURCE_CONTRIBUTOR detection in <code>postinstall</code>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/scottarc">@scottarc</a></li>
<li>Added Drone CI in <code>postinstall</code> CI detection <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/781" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/781/hovercard">#781</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.6.4">3.6.4 - 2020.01.14</a></h5><a id="user-content-364---20200114" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.6.4 - 2020.01.14" href="#364---20200114"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Prevented a possible almost infinite loop in non-standard implementations of some backward iteration array methods</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.6.3">3.6.3 - 2020.01.11</a></h5><a id="user-content-363---20200111" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.6.3 - 2020.01.11" href="#363---20200111"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed replacement of substitutes of undefined capture groups in <code>.replace</code> in Safari 13.0-, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/471" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/471/hovercard">#471</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/745" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/745/hovercard">#745</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/mattclough1">@mattclough1</a></li>
<li>Improved compat data for old engines</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.6.2">3.6.2 - 2020.01.07</a></h5><a id="user-content-362---20200107" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.6.2 - 2020.01.07" href="#362---20200107"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed early implementations of <code>Array#{ every, forEach, includes, indexOf, lastIndexOf, reduce, reduceRight, slice, some, splice }</code> for the usage of <code>ToLength</code></li>
<li>Added <code>RegExp#exec</code> dependency to methods which depends on the correctness of logic of this method (<code>3.6.0-3.6.1</code> issue), <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/741" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/741/hovercard">#741</a></li>
<li>Refactored some internals</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.6.1">3.6.1 - 2019.12.25</a></h5><a id="user-content-361---20191225" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.6.1 - 2019.12.25" href="#361---20191225"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed a bug related <code>Symbol</code> with multiple copies of <code>core-js</code> (for <code>3.4.2-3.6.0</code>), <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/736" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/736/hovercard">#736</a></li>
<li>Refactored some tools</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.6.0">3.6.0 - 2019.12.19</a></h5><a id="user-content-360---20191219" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.6.0 - 2019.12.19" href="#360---20191219"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added support of sticky (<code>y</code>) <code>RegExp</code> flag, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/372" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/372/hovercard">#372</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/732" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/732/hovercard">#732</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/492" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/492/hovercard">#492</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/cvle">@cvle</a> and <a href="https://github.com/nicolo-ribaudo">@nicolo-ribaudo</a></li>
<li>Added <code>RegExp#test</code> delegation to <code>RegExp#exec</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/732" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/732/hovercard">#732</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/cvle">@cvle</a></li>
<li>Fixed some cases of <code>Object.create(null)</code> in IE8-, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/727" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/727/hovercard">#727</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/728" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/728/hovercard">#728</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/aleen42">@aleen42</a></li>
<li>Allowed object of minimum environment versions as <code>core-js-compat</code> and <code>core-js-builder</code> <code>targets</code> argument</li>
<li>Allowed corresponding to Babel <code>targets.esmodules</code>, <code>targets.browsers</code>, <code>targets.node</code> options in <code>core-js-compat</code> and <code>core-js-builder</code></li>
<li>Engines in compat data and results of targets parsing sorted alphabetically</li>
<li>Fixed <code>features/instance/match-all</code> entry compat data</li>
<li>Fixed <code>Array.prototype[@@unscopables]</code> descriptor (was writable)</li>
<li>Added Samsung Internet 11 compat data mapping</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.5.0">3.5.0 - 2019.12.12</a></h5><a id="user-content-350---20191212" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.5.0 - 2019.12.12" href="#350---20191212"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-object-iteration">object iteratoration stage 1 proposal</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Object.iterateKeys</code></li>
<li><code>Object.iterateValues</code></li>
<li><code>Object.iterateEntries</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.4.8">3.4.8 - 2019.12.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-348---20191209" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.4.8 - 2019.12.09" href="#348---20191209"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added one more workaround for broken in previous versions <code>inspectSource</code> helper, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/719" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/719/hovercard">#719</a></li>
<li>Added Opera Mobile compat data</li>
<li>Updated Samsung Internet, iOS, old Node and Android compat data mapping</li>
<li><code>es.string.match-all</code> marked as completely supported in FF73</li>
<li>Generate <code>core-js-compat/modules</code> since often we need just the list of <code>core-js</code> modules</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.11">2.6.11 [LEGACY] - 2019.12.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-2611-legacy---20191209" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.11 [LEGACY] - 2019.12.09" href="#2611-legacy---20191209"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Returned usage of <code>node -e</code> in the <code>postinstall</code> scripts for better cross-platform compatibility, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/582" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/582/hovercard">#582</a></li>
<li>Improved CI detection in the <code>postinstall</code> script, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/707" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/707/hovercard">#707</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.4.7">3.4.7 - 2019.12.03</a></h5><a id="user-content-347---20191203" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.4.7 - 2019.12.03" href="#347---20191203"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed an NPM publishing issue</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.4.6">3.4.6 - 2019.12.03</a></h5><a id="user-content-346---20191203" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.4.6 - 2019.12.03" href="#346---20191203"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Improved iOS compat data - added missed mapping iOS 12.2 -&gt; Safari 12.1, added bug fixes from patch releases</li>
<li>Added Safari 13.1 compat data</li>
<li>Added missed in <code>core-js-compat</code> helpers <code>ie_mob</code> normalization</li>
<li>Normalize the result of <code>getModulesListForTargetVersion</code> <code>core-js-compat</code> helper</li>
<li>Improved CI detection in the <code>postinstall</code> script, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/707" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/707/hovercard">#707</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.4.5">3.4.5 - 2019.11.28</a></h5><a id="user-content-345---20191128" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.4.5 - 2019.11.28" href="#345---20191128"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Detect incorrect order of operations in <code>Object.assign</code>, MS Edge bug</li>
<li>Detect usage of <code>ToLength</code> in <code>Array#{ filter, map }</code>, FF48-49 and MS Edge 14- issues</li>
<li>Detect incorrect MS Edge 17-18 <code>Reflect.set</code> which allows setting the property to object with non-writable property on the prototype</li>
<li>Fixed <code>inspectSource</code> helper with multiple <code>core-js</code> copies and some related features like some edge cases of <code>Promise</code> feature detection</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.4.4">3.4.4 - 2019.11.27</a></h5><a id="user-content-344---20191127" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.4.4 - 2019.11.27" href="#344---20191127"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added feature detection for Safari <a href="https://bugs.webkit.org/show_bug.cgi?id=200829" rel="nofollow">non-generic <code>Promise#finally</code> bug</a> <strong>(critical for <code>core-js-pure</code>)</strong></li>
<li>Fixed missed <code>esnext.string.code-points</code> in <code>core-js/features/string</code> entry point</li>
<li>Updated <code>Iterator</code> proposal feature detection for the case of non-standard <code>Iterator</code> in FF44-</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.4.3">3.4.3 - 2019.11.26</a></h5><a id="user-content-343---20191126" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.4.3 - 2019.11.26" href="#343---20191126"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed missed <code>es.json.stringify</code> and some modules from iteration helpers proposal in some entry points <strong>(includes the root entry point)</strong></li>
<li>Added a workaround of <code>String#{ endsWith, startsWith }</code> MDN polyfills bugs, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/702" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/702/hovercard">#702</a></li>
<li>Fixed <code>.size</code> property descriptor of <code>Map</code> / <code>Set</code> in the pure version</li>
<li>Refactoring, some internal improvements</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.4.2">3.4.2 - 2019.11.22</a></h5><a id="user-content-342---20191122" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.4.2 - 2019.11.22" href="#342---20191122"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Don't use polyfilled symbols as internal uids, a workaround for some incorrect use cases</li>
<li><code>String#replaceAll</code> is available only in nightly FF builds</li>
<li>Improved <code>Promise</code> feature detection for the case of V8 6.6 with multiple <code>core-js</code> copies</li>
<li>Some internals optimizations</li>
<li>Added Node 13.2 -&gt; V8 7.9 compat data mapping</li>
<li>Returned usage of <code>node -e</code> in <code>postinstall</code> scripts</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.4.1">3.4.1 - 2019.11.12</a></h5><a id="user-content-341---20191112" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.4.1 - 2019.11.12" href="#341---20191112"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Throw when <code>(Async)Iterator#flatMap</code> mapper returns a non-iterable, per <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/issues/55" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/issues/55/hovercard">tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/55</a> and <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/59" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/pull/59/hovercard">tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/59</a></li>
<li>Removed own <code>AggregateError#toString</code>, per <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-any/pull/49" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-promise-any/pull/49/hovercard">tc39/proposal-promise-any/49</a></li>
<li>Global <code>core-js</code> <code>Promise</code> polyfill passes feature detection in the pure versions</li>
<li>Fixed indexes in <code>String#replaceAll</code> callbacks</li>
<li><code>String#replaceAll</code> marked as supported by FF72</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.4.0">3.4.0 - 2019.11.07</a></h5><a id="user-content-340---20191107" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.4.0 - 2019.11.07" href="#340---20191107"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-well-formed-stringify">well-formed <code>JSON.stringify</code></a>, ES2019 feature, thanks <a href="https://github.com/ExE-Boss">@ExE-Boss</a> and <a href="https://github.com/WebReflection">@WebReflection</a> for the idea</li>
<li>Fixed <code>Math.signbit</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/687" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/687/hovercard">#687</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/chicoxyzzy">@chicoxyzzy</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.3.6">3.3.6 - 2019.11.01</a></h5><a id="user-content-336---20191101" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.3.6 - 2019.11.01" href="#336---20191101"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Don't detect Chakra-based Edge as Chrome in the <code>userAgent</code> parsing</li>
<li>Fixed inheritance in typed array constructors wrappers, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/683" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/683/hovercard">#683</a></li>
<li>Added one more workaround for correct work of early <code>fetch</code> implementations with polyfilled <code>URLSearchParams</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/680" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/680/hovercard">#680</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.3.5">3.3.5 - 2019.10.29</a></h5><a id="user-content-335---20191029" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.3.5 - 2019.10.29" href="#335---20191029"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added a workaround of V8 deoptimization which causes serious performance degradation (~4x in my tests) of <code>Array#concat</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/679" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/679/hovercard">#679</a></li>
<li>Added a workaround of V8 deoptimization which causes slightly performance degradation of <code>Promise</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/679" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/679/hovercard">#679</a></li>
<li>Added <code>(Async)Iterator.prototype.constructor -&gt; (Async)Iterator</code> per <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/issues/60" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers/issues/60/hovercard">this issue</a></li>
<li>Added compat data for Chromium-based Edge</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.3.4">3.3.4 - 2019.10.25</a></h5><a id="user-content-334---20191025" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.3.4 - 2019.10.25" href="#334---20191025"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added a workaround of V8 deoptimization which causes serious performance degradation (~20x in my tests) of some <code>RegExp</code>-related methods like <code>String#split</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/306" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/306/hovercard">#306</a></li>
<li>Added a workaround of V8 deoptimization which causes serious performance degradation (up to 100x in my tests) of <code>Array#splice</code> and slightly <code>Array#{ filter, map }</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/677" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/677/hovercard">#677</a></li>
<li>Fixed work of <code>fetch</code> with polyfilled <code>URLSearchParams</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/674" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/674/hovercard">#674</a></li>
<li>Fixed an edge case of <code>String#replaceAll</code> with an empty search value</li>
<li>Added compat data for Chrome 80</li>
<li><code>package-lock.json</code> no longer generated in libraries</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.3.3">3.3.3 - 2019.10.22</a></h5><a id="user-content-333---20191022" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.3.3 - 2019.10.22" href="#333---20191022"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>gopher</code> removed from <code>URL</code> special cases per <a href="https://github.com/whatwg/url/issues/342" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/whatwg/url/issues/342/hovercard">this issue</a> and <a href="https://github.com/whatwg/url/pull/453" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/whatwg/url/pull/453/hovercard">this PR</a></li>
<li>Added compat data for iOS 13 and Node 13.0</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.3.2">3.3.2 - 2019.10.14</a></h5><a id="user-content-332---20191014" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.3.2 - 2019.10.14" href="#332---20191014"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed compatibility of <code>core-js-compat</code> with Node 6 and Yarn, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/669" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/669/hovercard">#669</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.3.1">3.3.1 - 2019.10.13</a></h5><a id="user-content-331---20191013" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.3.1 - 2019.10.13" href="#331---20191013"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed an NPM publishing issue</li>
</ul>
