<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.3.0">3.3.0 - 2019.10.13</a></h5><a id="user-content-330---20191013" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.3.0 - 2019.10.13" href="#330---20191013"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong><code>String#{ matchAll, replaceAll }</code> throws an error on non-global regex argument per <a href="https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/1716" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/ecma262/pull/1716/hovercard">the decision from TC39 meetings</a> (+ <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-replaceall/pull/24" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-string-replaceall/pull/24/hovercard">this PR</a>). It's a breaking change, but since it's a breaking change in the ES spec, it's added at the minor release</strong></li>
<li><code>globalThis</code> moved to stable ES, <a href="https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/60#issuecomment-537217903" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/babel/proposals/issues/60/hovercard">per October TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li><code>Promise.any</code> moved to stage 3, some minor internal changes, <a href="https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/60#issuecomment-538084885" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/babel/proposals/issues/60/hovercard">per October TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li><code>String#replaceAll</code> moved to stage 3, <a href="https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/60#issuecomment-537530013" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/babel/proposals/issues/60/hovercard">per October TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-iterator-helpers">iterator helpers stage 2 proposal</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Iterator</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Iterator.from</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#asIndexedPairs</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#drop</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#every</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#filter</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#find</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#flatMap</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#forEach</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#map</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#reduce</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#some</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#take</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#toArray</code></li>
<li><code>Iterator#@@toStringTag</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>AsyncIterator.from</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#asIndexedPairs</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#drop</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#every</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#filter</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#find</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#flatMap</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#forEach</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#map</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#reduce</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#some</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#take</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#toArray</code></li>
<li><code>AsyncIterator#@@toStringTag</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Updated <code>Map#upsert</code> (<code>Map#updateOrInsert</code> before) <a href="https://github.com/thumbsupep/proposal-upsert">proposal</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Moved to stage 2, <a href="https://github.com/babel/proposals/issues/60#issuecomment-537606117" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/babel/proposals/issues/60/hovercard">per October TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li><code>Map#updateOrInsert</code> renamed to <code>Map#upsert</code></li>
<li>Added <code>WeakMap#upsert</code></li>
<li>You can don't pass one of the callbacks</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added a workaround for iOS Safari MessageChannel + bfcache bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/624" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/624/hovercard">#624</a></li>
<li>Added a workaround for Chrome 33 / Android 4.4.4 <code>Promise</code> bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/640" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/640/hovercard">#640</a></li>
<li>Replaced broken <code>URL</code> constructor in Safari and <code>URLSearchParams</code> in Chrome 66-, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/656" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/656/hovercard">#656</a></li>
<li>Added compat data for Node up to 12.11, FF 69, Samsung up to 10.2 and Phantom 1.9</li>
<li><code>Math.hypot</code> marked as not supported in Chrome 77 since <a href="https://bugs.chromium.org/p/v8/issues/detail?id=9546" rel="nofollow">a bug in this method</a> was not fixed before the stable Chrome 77 release</li>
<li>Fixed unnecessary exposing on <code>Symbol.matchAll</code> in <code>esnext.string.match-all</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/626" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/626/hovercard">#626</a></li>
<li>Fixed missed cases <a href="https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/issues/976" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/ecma262/issues/976/hovercard">access the <code>.next</code> method once, at the beginning, of the iteration protocol</a></li>
<li>Show similar <code>postinstall</code> messages only once per <code>npm i</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/597" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/597/hovercard">#597</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/remy">@remy</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.10">2.6.10 [LEGACY] - 2019.10.13</a></h5><a id="user-content-2610-legacy---20191013" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.10 [LEGACY] - 2019.10.13" href="#2610-legacy---20191013"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Show similar <code>postinstall</code> messages only once per <code>npm i</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/597" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/597/hovercard">#597</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.2.1">3.2.1 - 2019.08.12</a></h5><a id="user-content-321---20190812" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.2.1 - 2019.08.12" href="#321---20190812"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added a workaround for possible recursion in microtasks caused by conflicts with other <code>Promise</code> polyfills, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/615" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/615/hovercard">#615</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.2.0">3.2.0 - 2019.08.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-320---20190809" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.2.0 - 2019.08.09" href="#320---20190809"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Promise.allSettled</code> moved to stable ES, per July TC39 meeting</li>
<li><code>Promise.any</code> moved to stage 2, <code>.errors</code> property of <code>AggregateError</code> instances made non-enumerable, per July TC39 meeting</li>
<li><code>using</code> statement proposal moved to stage 2, added <code>Symbol.asyncDispose</code>, per July TC39 meeting</li>
<li>Added <code>Array.isTemplateObject</code> <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-array-is-template-object">stage 2 proposal</a>, per June TC39 meeting</li>
<li>Added <code>Map#updateOrInsert</code> <a href="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1_xtrGSoN1-l2Q74eCXPHBbbrBHsVyqArWN0ebnW-pVQ/" rel="nofollow">stage 1 proposal</a>, per July TC39 meeting</li>
<li>Added a fix for <a href="https://bugs.chromium.org/p/v8/issues/detail?id=9546" rel="nofollow"><code>Math.hypot</code> V8 7.7 bug</a>, since it's still not stable without adding results to <code>core-js-compat</code></li>
<li>Added a workaround for APIs where not possible to replace broken native <code>Promise</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/579" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/579/hovercard">#579</a> - added <code>.finally</code> and patched <code>.then</code> to / on native <code>Promise</code> prototype</li>
<li>Fixed crashing of Opera Presto, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/595" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/595/hovercard">#595</a></li>
<li>Fixed incorrect early breaking of <code>{ Map, Set, WeakMap, WeakSet }.deleteAll</code></li>
<li>Fixed some missed dependencies in entry points</li>
<li>Added compat data for Node 12.5, FF 67, Safari 13</li>
<li>Added support of <code>DISABLE_OPENCOLLECTIVE</code> env variable to <code>postinstall</code> script</li>
<li>Removed <code>core-js-pure</code> dependency from <code>core-js-compat</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/590" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/590/hovercard">#590</a></li>
<li>Fixed generation of <code>core-js-compat</code> on Windows, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/606" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/606/hovercard">#606</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.1.4">3.1.4 - 2019.06.15</a></h5><a id="user-content-314---20190615" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.1.4 - 2019.06.15" href="#314---20190615"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Refactoring. Many minor internal improvements and fixes like:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Improved <code>Symbol.keyFor</code> complexity to <code>O(1)</code></li>
<li>Fixed the order of arguments validation in <code>String.prototype.{ endsWith, includes, startsWith }</code></li>
<li>Internal implementation of <code>RegExp#flags</code> helper now respect <code>dotAll</code> flag (mainly related to the <code>pure</code> version)</li>
<li>Performance optimizations related old V8</li>
<li>Etc.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.1.3">3.1.3 - 2019.05.27</a></h5><a id="user-content-313---20190527" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.1.3 - 2019.05.27" href="#313---20190527"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed <code>core-js/features/reflect/delete-metadata</code> entry point</li>
<li>Some fixes and improvements of the <code>postinstall</code> script like support <code>npm</code> color config (<a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/556" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/556/hovercard">#556</a>) or adding support of <code>ADBLOCK</code> env variable</li>
<li>Refactoring and some minor fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.9">2.6.9 [LEGACY] - 2019.05.27</a></h5><a id="user-content-269-legacy---20190527" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.9 [LEGACY] - 2019.05.27" href="#269-legacy---20190527"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some fixes and improvements of the <code>postinstall</code> script like support <code>npm</code> color config (<a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/556" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/556/hovercard">#556</a>) or adding support of <code>ADBLOCK</code> env variable</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.1.2">3.1.2 - 2019.05.22</a></h5><a id="user-content-312---20190522" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.1.2 - 2019.05.22" href="#312---20190522"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added a workaround of a strange <code>npx</code> bug on <code>postinstall</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/551" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/551/hovercard">#551</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.8">2.6.8 [LEGACY] - 2019.05.22</a></h5><a id="user-content-268-legacy---20190522" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.8 [LEGACY] - 2019.05.22" href="#268-legacy---20190522"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added a workaround of a strange <code>npx</code> bug on <code>postinstall</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/551" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/551/hovercard">#551</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.1.1">3.1.1 - 2019.05.21</a></h5><a id="user-content-311---20190521" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.1.1 - 2019.05.21" href="#311---20190521"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added one more workaround of alternative not completely correct <code>Symbol</code> polyfills, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/550" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/550/hovercard">#550</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/554" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/554/hovercard">#554</a></li>
<li>Reverted <code>esnext.string.match-all</code> in some entry points for fix autogeneration of <code>core-js-compat/entries</code> and backward <code>@babel/preset-env</code> compatibility</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.7">2.6.7 [LEGACY] - 2019.05.21</a></h5><a id="user-content-267-legacy---20190521" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.7 [LEGACY] - 2019.05.21" href="#267-legacy---20190521"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added one more workaround of alternative not completely correct <code>Symbol</code> polyfills, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/550" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/550/hovercard">#550</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/554" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/554/hovercard">#554</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.1.0">3.1.0 - 2019.05.20</a></h5><a id="user-content-310---20190520" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.1.0 - 2019.05.20" href="#310---20190520"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>String#matchAll</code> moved to stable ES, exposed <code>Symbol.matchAll</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/516" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/516/hovercard">#516</a></li>
<li><code>Promise.allSettled</code> moved to stage 3, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/515" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/515/hovercard">#515</a></li>
<li><code>String#replaceAll</code> moved to stage 2, behavior updated by the spec draft, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/524" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/524/hovercard">#524</a></li>
<li><code>Promise.any</code> moved to stage 1, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/517" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/517/hovercard">#517</a></li>
<li>Removed <code>es.regexp.flags</code> dependency from <code>es.regexp.to-string</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/536" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/536/hovercard">#536</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/537" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/537/hovercard">#537</a></li>
<li>Fixed IE8- non-enumerable properties support in <code>Object.{ assign, entries, values }</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/541" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/541/hovercard">#541</a></li>
<li>Fixed support of primitives in <code>Object.getOwnPropertySymbols</code> in Chrome 38 / 39, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/539" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/539/hovercard">#539</a></li>
<li><code>window.postMessage</code>-based task implementation uses location origin over <code>'*'</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/542" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/542/hovercard">#542</a></li>
<li>Lookup <code>PromiseConstructor.resolve</code> only once in <code>Promise</code> combinators, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/1506" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/ecma262/pull/1506/hovercard">tc39/ecma262#1506</a></li>
<li>Temporarily removed <code>core-js</code> dependency from <code>core-js-compat</code> since it's required for missed at this moment feature</li>
<li>Show a message on <code>postinstall</code></li>
<li>Added compat data for Chrome 76, FF 67, Node 12</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.6">2.6.6 [LEGACY] - 2019.05.20</a></h5><a id="user-content-266-legacy---20190520" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.6 [LEGACY] - 2019.05.20" href="#266-legacy---20190520"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed IE8- non-enumerable properties support in <code>Object.{ assign, entries, values }</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/541" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/541/hovercard">#541</a></li>
<li>Fixed support of primitives in <code>Object.getOwnPropertySymbols</code> in Chrome 38 / 39, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/539" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/539/hovercard">#539</a></li>
<li>Show a message on <code>postinstall</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.0.1">3.0.1 - 2019.04.06</a></h5><a id="user-content-301---20190406" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.0.1 - 2019.04.06" href="#301---20190406"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed some cases of work with malformed URI sequences in <code>URLSearchParams</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/525" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/525/hovercard">#525</a></li>
<li>Added a workaround for a rollup issue, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/513" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/513/hovercard">#513</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v3.0.0">3.0.0 - 2019.03.19</a></h5><a id="user-content-300---20190319" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.0.0 - 2019.03.19" href="#300---20190319"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Features
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Add new features:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Object.fromEntries</code> (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-object-from-entries">ECMAScript 2019</a>)</li>
<li><code>Symbol#description</code> (<a href="https://tc39.es/ecma262/#sec-symbol.prototype.description" rel="nofollow">ECMAScript 2019</a>)</li>
<li>New <code>Set</code> methods (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-set-methods">stage 2 proposal</a>)
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Set#difference</code></li>
<li><code>Set#intersection</code></li>
<li><code>Set#isDisjointFrom</code></li>
<li><code>Set#isSubsetOf</code></li>
<li><code>Set#isSupersetOf</code></li>
<li><code>Set#symmetricDifference</code></li>
<li><code>Set#union</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>Promise.allSettled</code> (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-allSettled">stage 2 proposal</a>)</li>
<li>Getting last item from <code>Array</code> (<a href="https://github.com/keithamus/proposal-array-last">stage 1 proposal</a>)
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Array#lastItem</code></li>
<li><code>Array#lastIndex</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>String#replaceAll</code> (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-replace-all">stage 1 proposal</a>)</li>
<li><code>String#codePoints</code> (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-prototype-codepoints">stage 1 proposal</a>)</li>
<li>New collections methods (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/collection-methods">stage 1 proposal</a>)
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Map.groupBy</code></li>
<li><code>Map.keyBy</code></li>
<li><code>Map#deleteAll</code></li>
<li><code>Map#every</code></li>
<li><code>Map#filter</code></li>
<li><code>Map#find</code></li>
<li><code>Map#findKey</code></li>
<li><code>Map#includes</code></li>
<li><code>Map#keyOf</code></li>
<li><code>Map#mapKeys</code></li>
<li><code>Map#mapValues</code></li>
<li><code>Map#merge</code></li>
<li><code>Map#reduce</code></li>
<li><code>Map#some</code></li>
<li><code>Map#update</code></li>
<li><code>Set#addAll</code></li>
<li><code>Set#deleteAll</code></li>
<li><code>Set#every</code></li>
<li><code>Set#filter</code></li>
<li><code>Set#find</code></li>
<li><code>Set#join</code></li>
<li><code>Set#map</code></li>
<li><code>Set#reduce</code></li>
<li><code>Set#some</code></li>
<li><code>WeakMap#deleteAll</code></li>
<li><code>WeakSet#addAll</code></li>
<li><code>WeakSet#deleteAll</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>compositeKey</code> and <code>compositeSymbol</code> methods (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-richer-keys/tree/master/compositeKey">stage 1 proposal</a>)</li>
<li><code>Number.fromString</code> (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-number-fromstring">stage 1 proposal</a>)</li>
<li><code>Math.seededPRNG</code> (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-seeded-random">stage 1 proposal</a>)</li>
<li><code>Symbol.patternMatch</code> (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-pattern-matching">for stage 1 pattern matching proposal</a>)</li>
<li><code>Symbol.dispose</code> (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-using-statement">for stage 1 <code>using</code> statement proposal</a>)</li>
<li><code>Promise.any</code> (with <code>AggregateError</code>) (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-any">stage 0 proposal</a>)</li>
<li><code>URL</code> and <code>URLSearchParam</code> <a href="https://url.spec.whatwg.org/" rel="nofollow">from <code>URL</code> standard</a>, also <a href="https://github.com/jasnell/proposal-url">stage 0 proposal to ECMAScript</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>URL</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>URL#href</code></li>
<li><code>URL#origin</code></li>
<li><code>URL#protocol</code></li>
<li><code>URL#username</code></li>
<li><code>URL#password</code></li>
<li><code>URL#host</code></li>
<li><code>URL#hostname</code></li>
<li><code>URL#port</code></li>
<li><code>URL#pathname</code></li>
<li><code>URL#search</code></li>
<li><code>URL#searchParams</code></li>
<li><code>URL#hash</code></li>
<li><code>URL#toString</code></li>
<li><code>URL#toJSON</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>URLSearchParams#append</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#delete</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#get</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#getAll</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#has</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#set</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#sort</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#toString</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#keys</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#values</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#entries</code></li>
<li><code>URLSearchParams#@@iterator</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>.forEach</code> method on iterable DOM collections (<a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/329" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/329/hovercard">#329</a>)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Improve existing features:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Add triggering unhandled <code>Promise</code> rejection events (instead of only global handlers), <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/205" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/205/hovercard">#205</a>.</li>
<li>Wrap <code>fetch</code> for correct with polyfilled <code>Promise</code> and preventing problems like <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/178" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/178/hovercard">#178</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/332" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/332/hovercard">#332</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/371" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/371/hovercard">#371</a>.</li>
<li>Add support of <code>@@isConcatSpreadable</code> to <code>Array#concat</code>.</li>
<li>Add support of <code>@@species</code> to <code>Array#{concat, filter, map, slice, splice}</code>.</li>
<li>Add direct <code>.exec</code> calling to <code>RegExp#{@@replace, @@split, @@match, @@search}</code>. Also, added fixes for <code>RegExp#exec</code> method. <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/411" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/411/hovercard">#411</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/434" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/434/hovercard">#434</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/453" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/453/hovercard">#453</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/nicolo-ribaudo"><strong>@nicolo-ribaudo</strong></a>.</li>
<li>Correct iterators prototypes chain, related <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/261" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/261/hovercard">#261</a>.</li>
<li>Correct Typed Arrays prototypes chain, related <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/378" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/378/hovercard">#378</a>.</li>
<li>Make the internal state of polyfilled features completely unobservable, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/146" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/146/hovercard">#146</a>.</li>
<li>Add validation of receiver's internal class to missed non-generic methods.</li>
<li>Fix descriptors of global properties.</li>
<li>In the version without global pollution, if <code>Object#toString</code> does not support <code>@@toStringTag</code>, add to wrapped prototypes own <code>toString</code> method with <code>@@toStringTag</code> logic, see <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/199" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/199/hovercard">#199</a>.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Update standard features and proposals:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>asap</code> (old stage 0 proposal) replaced by <code>queueMicrotask</code> (<a href="https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/timers-and-user-prompts.html#dom-queuemicrotask" rel="nofollow">a part of HTML spec</a>)</li>
<li>Update <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-observable"><code>Observable</code></a> (#257, #276, etc.)</li>
<li>Update <code>Array#flatten</code> -&gt; <code>Array#flat</code> and <code>Array#flatMap</code></li>
<li>Update <code>global</code> <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-global">stage 3 proposal</a> - rename <code>global</code> to <code>globalThis</code></li>
<li>Update <code>String#matchAll</code> (<a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/17" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/17/hovercard">proposal-string-matchall#17</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/38" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/38/hovercard">proposal-string-matchall#38</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/41" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-string-matchall/pull/41/hovercard">proposal-string-matchall#41</a>, etc.) and move to the stage 3</li>
<li>Update <code>.name</code> properties of <code>String#{trimStart, trimEnd , trimLeft, trimRight}</code>, move to the stage 3</li>
<li>Remove mongolian vowel separator (U+180E) from the list of whitespaces for methods like <code>String#trim</code> (ES6 -&gt; ES7)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Mark ES2016, ES2017, ES2018, ES2019 features as stable:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Array#{ flat, flatMap }</code></li>
<li><code>{ Array, %TypedArray% }#includes</code></li>
<li><code>Object.{ values, entries}</code></li>
<li><code>Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors</code></li>
<li><code>String#{ padStart, padEnd }</code></li>
<li><code>String#{ trimStart, trimEnd, trimLeft, trimRight }</code></li>
<li><code>Promise#finally</code></li>
<li><code>Symbol.asyncIterator</code></li>
<li><code>Object#__(define|lookup)[GS]etter__</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Remove obsolete features:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Error.isError</code> (withdrawn)</li>
<li><code>System.global</code> and <code>global</code> (replaced by <code>globalThis</code>)</li>
<li><code>Map#toJSON</code> and <code>Set#toJSON</code> (rejected)</li>
<li><code>RegExp.escape</code> (rejected)</li>
<li><code>Reflect.enumerate</code> (removed from the spec)</li>
<li>Unnecessary iteration methods from <code>CSSRuleList</code>, <code>MediaList</code>, <code>StyleSheetList</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>No more non-standard features</strong>, finally removed:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Dict</code></li>
<li><code>Object.{classof, isObject, define, make}</code></li>
<li><code>Function#part</code></li>
<li><code>Number#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>String#{escapeHTML, unescapeHTML}</code></li>
<li><code>delay</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Add <code>.sham</code> flag to features which can't be properly polyfilled and / or not recommended for usage:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Symbol</code> constructor - we can't add new primitives. <code>Object.prototype</code> accessors too expensive.</li>
<li><code>Object.{create, defineProperty, defineProperties, getOwnPropertyDescriptor, getOwnPropertyDescriptors}</code>, <code>Reflect.{defineProperty, getOwnPropertyDescriptor}</code> can't be properly polyfilled without descriptors support.</li>
<li><code>Object.{freeze, seal, preventExtensions}</code>, <code>Reflect.preventExtensions</code> can't be properly polyfilled in ES3 environment.</li>
<li><code>Object.getPrototypeOf</code> can be deceived in ES3 environment.</li>
<li><code>Reflect.construct</code> can't be polyfilled for a correct work with <code>newTarget</code> argument on built-ins.</li>
<li>Typed Array constructors polyfill is quite correct but too expensive.</li>
<li><code>URL</code> constructor in engines without descriptors support.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Bug and compatibility fixes:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fix deoptimisation of iterators in V8, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/377" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/377/hovercard">#377</a>.</li>
<li>Fix import of property before constructor which should contain this property, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/262" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/262/hovercard">#262</a>.</li>
<li>Fix some cases of IE11 <code>WeakMap</code> frozen keys fallback, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/384" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/384/hovercard">#384</a>.</li>
<li>Fix non-enumerable integer keys issue because of Nashorn ~ JDK8 bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/389" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/389/hovercard">#389</a>.</li>
<li>Fix <a href="https://bugs.webkit.org/show_bug.cgi?id=188794" rel="nofollow">Safari 12.0 <code>Array#reverse</code> bug</a>.</li>
<li>One more fix for microtasks in iOS related <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/339" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/339/hovercard">#339</a>.</li>
<li>Added a fallback for <a href="https://github.com/mozilla/rhino/issues/346" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/mozilla/rhino/issues/346/hovercard">Rhino bug</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/440" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/440/hovercard">#440</a>.</li>
<li>Many other internal fixes and improvements.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Repository:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Change <code>core-js</code> repository structure to monorepo with packages in <code>/packages/</code> directory.</li>
<li>Clean-up it, remove all possible duplicates, generated files, etc.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Packages:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Extract a version without global namespace pollution to a separate <code>core-js-pure</code> package (replacement for <code>core-js/library</code>).</strong></li>
<li><strong>Leave only one pair of bundles (global, with all polyfills) and move it to <code>core-js-bundle</code> package.</strong></li>
<li>Remove bundling logic from <code>core-js</code> package, leave it only in <code>core-js-builder</code> package.</li>
<li>Clean-up packages.</li>
<li>Because of all approaches, <strong>reduce size of packages from ~2mb for <code>core-js@2</code> to</strong>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>~500kb for <code>core-js</code> package</strong></li>
<li><strong>~440kb for <code>core-js-pure</code> package</strong></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Finally remove <code>bower.json</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>CommonJS API, namespaces:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Add availability <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/blob/master/README.md#configurable-level-of-aggressiveness">configuration of aggressiveness</a>.</li>
<li>Move <code>core-js/library</code> to separate <code>core-js-pure</code> package.</li>
<li>Because of removing all non-standard features, we no longer need <code>core-js/shim</code> entry point, replace it just with <code>core-js</code>.</li>
<li>Move all features from ES5, ES2015, ES2016, ES2017, ES2018 and ES2019 to one namespace for stable ES - it's available as <code>core-js/es</code>, all those features in <code>modules</code> folder has <code>es.</code> prefix.</li>
<li>Change prefix for ES proposals from <code>es7.</code> to <code>esnext.</code>, they no longer available in <code>core-js/es7</code>, use <code>core-js/stage/*</code> instead of that.</li>
<li>Rename <code>core-js(/library)/fn</code> to <code>core-js(-pure)/features</code> for improve readability.</li>
<li>Allow more granular inclusion of features from <code>/es/</code> path (for example, <code>core-js/es/array/from</code>).</li>
<li>Add <code>/stable/</code> entry points as an equal of <code>/features/</code> for stable features, without proposals.</li>
<li>Add <code>/proposals/</code> entry points for allow include all features from one proposal (for example, <code>core-js/proposals/reflect-metadata</code>).</li>
<li>Add <code>/es|stable|features/instance/</code> entry points for getting polyfill of the related method for passed instance (could be used in cases like <code>babel-runtime</code>).</li>
<li>Split typed arrays polyfills. Now you can, for example, load only required method (for example, <code>core-js/es/typed-array/from</code>).</li>
<li>Extract well-known symbols definition from <code>es.symbol</code> module for loading only required features, for example, in MS Edge.</li>
<li>Rename <code>web.dom</code> namespace to <code>web.dom-collections</code>.</li>
<li>Rename <code>es6.regexp.{match, replace, search, split}</code> -&gt; <code>es.string.{match, replace, search, split}</code> - mainly it's fixes / adding support of well-known symbols to string methods, only in second place adding related methods to regexp prototype.</li>
<li>Relax <code>/modules/</code> directory by moving internal modules to <code>/internals/</code> directory.</li>
<li>Remove deprecated array entry points: <code>core-js(/library)/fn/array/{pop, push, reverse, shift, unshift}</code>.</li>
<li><code>core</code> object no longer available in the global version, entry points which previously returned it now returns <code>globalThis</code> object. Also, don't set global <code>core</code> property.</li>
<li>Add some missing entry points.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Tools, tests, code quality:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>core-js-compat</code> package with:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Data about the necessity of <code>core-js</code> modules and API for getting a list of required <code>core-js</code> modules by <code>browserslist</code> query, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/466" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/466/hovercard">#466</a>.</li>
<li>Data which modules load by each entry point (mainly useful for tools like <code>@babel/preset-env</code>).</li>
<li>Data which modules added in minor versions (mainly useful for tools like <code>@babel/preset-env</code>).</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>core-js-builder</code> package:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>targets</code> option with <code>browserslist</code> query.</li>
<li>Removed an option for generation bundle of a version without global namespace pollution - now it's an odd use case.</li>
<li>Removed UMD wrapper from a generated code of bundles - we don't need it for a global polyfill.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>Getting rid of LiveScript</strong>, usage another language in JS standard library looks strange and impedes usage of tools like ESLint:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Tests are rewritten to JS.</li>
<li>Scripts are rewritten to JS.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Babel with minimalistic config (which should work anywhere) used on tests.</li>
<li>ESLint used on tests and tools.</li>
<li>Source code refactored for improving readability.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.5">2.6.5 - 2019.02.15</a></h5><a id="user-content-265---20190215" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.5 - 2019.02.15" href="#265---20190215"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed buggy <code>String#padStart</code> and <code>String#padEnd</code> mobile Safari implementations, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/414" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/414/hovercard">#414</a>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.4">2.6.4 - 2019.02.07</a></h5><a id="user-content-264---20190207" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.4 - 2019.02.07" href="#264---20190207"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added a workaround against crushing an old IE11.0.9600.16384 build, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/485" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/485/hovercard">#485</a>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.3">2.6.3 - 2019.01.22</a></h5><a id="user-content-263---20190122" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.3 - 2019.01.22" href="#263---20190122"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added a workaround for <code>babel-minify</code> bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/479" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/479/hovercard">#479</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.2">2.6.2 - 2019.01.10</a></h5><a id="user-content-262---20190110" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.2 - 2019.01.10" href="#262---20190110"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed handling of <code>$</code> in <code>String#replace</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/471" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/471/hovercard">#471</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.1">2.6.1 - 2018.12.18</a></h5><a id="user-content-261---20181218" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.1 - 2018.12.18" href="#261---20181218"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed an issue with minified version, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/463" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/463/hovercard">#463</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/465" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/465/hovercard">#465</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.6.0">2.6.0 - 2018.12.05</a></h5><a id="user-content-260---20181205" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.6.0 - 2018.12.05" href="#260---20181205"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Add direct <code>.exec</code> calling to <code>RegExp#{@@replace, @@split, @@match, @@search}</code>. Also, added fixes for <code>RegExp#exec</code> method. <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/428" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/428/hovercard">#428</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/435" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/435/hovercard">#435</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/458" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/458/hovercard">#458</a>, thanks <a href="https://github.com/nicolo-ribaudo"><strong>@nicolo-ribaudo</strong></a>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.5.7">2.5.7 - 2018.05.26</a></h5><a id="user-content-257---20180526" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.5.7 - 2018.05.26" href="#257---20180526"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Get rid of reserved variable name <code>final</code>, related <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/400" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/400/hovercard">#400</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.5.6">2.5.6 - 2018.05.07</a></h5><a id="user-content-256---20180507" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.5.6 - 2018.05.07" href="#256---20180507"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Forced replace native <code>Promise</code> in V8 6.6 (Node 10 and Chrome 66) because of <a href="https://bugs.chromium.org/p/chromium/issues/detail?id=830565" rel="nofollow">a bug with resolving custom thenables</a></li>
<li>Added a workaround for usage buggy native LG WebOS 2 <code>Promise</code> in microtask implementation, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/396" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/396/hovercard">#396</a></li>
<li>Added modern version internal debugging information about used versions</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.5.5">2.5.5 - 2018.04.08</a></h5><a id="user-content-255---20180408" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.5.5 - 2018.04.08" href="#255---20180408"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fix some edge cases of <code>Reflect.set</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/392" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/392/hovercard">#392</a> and <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/393" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/393/hovercard">#393</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.5.4">2.5.4 - 2018.03.27</a></h5><a id="user-content-254---20180327" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.5.4 - 2018.03.27" href="#254---20180327"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed one case of deoptimization built-in iterators in V8, related <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/377" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/377/hovercard">#377</a></li>
<li>Fixed some cases of iterators feature detection, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/368" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/368/hovercard">#368</a></li>
<li>Fixed manually entered NodeJS domains issue in <code>Promise</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/367" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/367/hovercard">#367</a></li>
<li>Fixed <code>Number.{parseInt, parseFloat}</code> entry points</li>
<li>Fixed <code>__(define|lookup)[GS]etter__</code> export in the <code>library</code> version</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.5.3">2.5.3 - 2017.12.12</a></h5><a id="user-content-253---20171212" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.5.3 - 2017.12.12" href="#253---20171212"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed calling <code>onunhandledrejectionhandler</code> multiple times for one <code>Promise</code> chain, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/318" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/318/hovercard">#318</a></li>
<li>Forced replacement of <code>String#{padStart, padEnd}</code> in Safari 10 because of <a href="https://bugs.webkit.org/show_bug.cgi?id=161944" rel="nofollow">a bug</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/280" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/280/hovercard">#280</a></li>
<li>Fixed <code>Array#@@iterator</code> in a very rare version of <code>WebKit</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/236" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/236/hovercard">#236</a> and <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/237" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/237/hovercard">#237</a></li>
<li>One more <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/345" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/345/hovercard">#345</a>-related fix</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.5.2">2.5.2 - 2017.12.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-252---20171209" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.5.2 - 2017.12.09" href="#252---20171209"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>MutationObserver</code> no longer used for microtask implementation in iOS Safari because of bug with scrolling, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/339" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/339/hovercard">#339</a></li>
<li>Fixed <code>JSON.stringify(undefined, replacer)</code> case in the wrapper from the <code>Symbol</code> polyfill, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/345" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/345/hovercard">#345</a></li>
<li><code>Array()</code> calls changed to <code>new Array()</code> for V8 optimisation</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.5.1">2.5.1 - 2017.09.01</a></h5><a id="user-content-251---20170901" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.5.1 - 2017.09.01" href="#251---20170901"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Updated <code>Promise#finally</code> per <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-finally/issues/37" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-promise-finally/issues/37/hovercard">tc39/proposal-promise-finally#37</a></li>
<li>Optimized usage of some internal helpers for reducing size of <code>shim</code> version</li>
<li>Fixed some entry points for virtual methods</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.5.0">2.5.0 - 2017.08.05</a></h5><a id="user-content-250---20170805" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.5.0 - 2017.08.05" href="#250---20170805"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>Promise#finally</code> <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-finally">stage 3 proposal</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/225" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/225/hovercard">#225</a></li>
<li>Added <code>Promise.try</code> <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-promise-try">stage 1 proposal</a></li>
<li>Added <code>Array#flatten</code> and <code>Array#flatMap</code> <a href="https://tc39.github.io/proposal-flatMap" rel="nofollow">stage 1 proposal</a></li>
<li>Added <code>.of</code> and <code>.from</code> methods on collection constructors <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-setmap-offrom">stage 1 proposal</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Map.of</code></li>
<li><code>Set.of</code></li>
<li><code>WeakSet.of</code></li>
<li><code>WeakMap.of</code></li>
<li><code>Map.from</code></li>
<li><code>Set.from</code></li>
<li><code>WeakSet.from</code></li>
<li><code>WeakMap.from</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <code>Math</code> extensions <a href="https://github.com/rwaldron/proposal-math-extensions">stage 1 proposal</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/226" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/226/hovercard">#226</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Math.clamp</code></li>
<li><code>Math.DEG_PER_RAD</code></li>
<li><code>Math.degrees</code></li>
<li><code>Math.fscale</code></li>
<li><code>Math.RAD_PER_DEG</code></li>
<li><code>Math.radians</code></li>
<li><code>Math.scale</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <code>Math.signbit</code> <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-Math.signbit">stage 1 proposal</a></li>
<li>Updated <code>global</code> <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-global">stage 3 proposal</a> - added <code>global</code> global object, <code>System.global</code> deprecated</li>
<li>Updated <code>Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors</code> to the <a href="https://tc39.es/ecma262/2017/#sec-object.getownpropertydescriptors" rel="nofollow">final version</a> - it should not create properties if descriptors are <code>undefined</code></li>
<li>Updated the list of iterable DOM collections, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/249" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/249/hovercard">#249</a>, added:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>CSSStyleDeclaration#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>CSSValueList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>ClientRectList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>DOMRectList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>DOMStringList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>DataTransferItemList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>FileList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>HTMLAllCollection#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>HTMLCollection#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>HTMLFormElement#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>HTMLSelectElement#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>MimeTypeArray#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>NamedNodeMap#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>PaintRequestList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>Plugin#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>PluginArray#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>SVGLengthList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>SVGNumberList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>SVGPathSegList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>SVGPointList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>SVGStringList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>SVGTransformList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>SourceBufferList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>TextTrackCueList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>TextTrackList#@@iterator</code></li>
<li><code>TouchList#@@iterator</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Updated stages of proposals:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-object-getownpropertydescriptors"><code>Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors</code></a> to <a href="https://tc39.es/ecma262/2017/#sec-object.getownpropertydescriptors" rel="nofollow">stage 4 (ES2017)</a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-pad-start-end">String padding</a> to <a href="https://tc39.es/ecma262/2017/#sec-string.prototype.padend" rel="nofollow">stage 4 (ES2017)</a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-global"><code>global</code></a> to <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-09/sept-28.md#revisit-systemglobal--global">stage 3</a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-left-right-trim">String trimming</a> to <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-07/jul-27.md#10iic-trimstarttrimend">stage 2</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Updated typed arrays to the modern (ES2016+) arguments validation,
<a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/pull/293" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/293/hovercard">#293</a></li>
<li>Fixed <code>%TypedArray%.from</code> Safari bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/285" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/285/hovercard">#285</a></li>
<li>Fixed compatibility with old version of Prototype.js, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/278" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/278/hovercard">#278</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/289" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/289/hovercard">#289</a></li>
<li><code>Function#name</code> no longer cache the result for correct behaviour with inherited constructors, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/296" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/296/hovercard">#296</a></li>
<li>Added errors on incorrect context of collection methods, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/272" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/272/hovercard">#272</a></li>
<li>Fixed conversion typed array constructors to string, fix <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/300" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/300/hovercard">#300</a></li>
<li>Fixed <code>Set#size</code> with debugger ReactNative for Android, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/297" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/297/hovercard">#297</a></li>
<li>Fixed an issue with Electron-based debugger, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/230" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/230/hovercard">#230</a></li>
<li>Fixed compatibility with incomplete third-party <code>WeakMap</code> polyfills, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/pull/252" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/252/hovercard">#252</a></li>
<li>Added a fallback for <code>Date#toJSON</code> in engines without native <code>Date#toISOString</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/220" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/220/hovercard">#220</a></li>
<li>Added support for Sphere Dispatch API, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/pull/286" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/286/hovercard">#286</a></li>
<li>Seriously changed the coding style and the <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/blob/master/.eslintrc.js">ESLint config</a></li>
<li>Updated many dev dependencies (<code>webpack</code>, <code>uglify</code>, etc)</li>
<li>Some other minor fixes and optimizations</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.4.1">2.4.1 - 2016.07.18</a></h5><a id="user-content-241---20160718" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.4.1 - 2016.07.18" href="#241---20160718"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed <code>script</code> tag for some parsers, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/204" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/204/hovercard">#204</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/216" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/216/hovercard">#216</a></li>
<li>Removed some unused variables, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/217" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/217/hovercard">#217</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/218" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/218/hovercard">#218</a></li>
<li>Fixed MS Edge <code>Reflect.construct</code> and <code>Reflect.apply</code> - they should not allow primitive as <code>argumentsList</code> argument</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.2.7">1.2.7 [LEGACY] - 2016.07.18</a></h5><a id="user-content-127-legacy---20160718" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.2.7 [LEGACY] - 2016.07.18" href="#127-legacy---20160718"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some fixes for issues like <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/159" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/159/hovercard">#159</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/186" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/186/hovercard">#186</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/194" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/194/hovercard">#194</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/207" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/207/hovercard">#207</a></li>
</ul>
