<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.4.0">2.4.0 - 2016.05.08</a></h5><a id="user-content-240---20160508" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.4.0 - 2016.05.08" href="#240---20160508"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>Observable</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zenparsing/es-observable">stage 1 proposal</a></li>
<li>Fixed behavior <code>Object.{getOwnPropertySymbols, getOwnPropertyDescriptor}</code> and <code>Object#propertyIsEnumerable</code> on <code>Object.prototype</code></li>
<li><code>Reflect.construct</code> and <code>Reflect.apply</code> should throw an error if <code>argumentsList</code> argument is not an object, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/194" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/194/hovercard">#194</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.3.0">2.3.0 - 2016.04.24</a></h5><a id="user-content-230---20160424" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.3.0 - 2016.04.24" href="#230---20160424"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>asap</code> for enqueuing microtasks, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2014-09/sept-25.md#510-globalasap-for-enqueuing-a-microtask">stage 0 proposal</a></li>
<li>Added well-known symbol <code>Symbol.asyncIterator</code> for <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-async-iteration">stage 2 async iteration proposal</a></li>
<li>Added well-known symbol <code>Symbol.observable</code> for <a href="https://github.com/zenparsing/es-observable">stage 1 observables proposal</a></li>
<li><code>String#{padStart, padEnd}</code> returns original string if filler is empty string, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-03/march-29.md#stringprototypepadstartpadend">TC39 meeting notes</a></li>
<li><code>Object.values</code> and <code>Object.entries</code> moved to stage 4 from 3, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-03/march-29.md#objectvalues--objectentries">TC39 meeting notes</a></li>
<li><code>System.global</code> moved to stage 2 from 1, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-03/march-29.md#systemglobal">TC39 meeting notes</a></li>
<li><code>Map#toJSON</code> and <code>Set#toJSON</code> rejected and will be removed from the next major release, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-03/march-31.md#mapprototypetojsonsetprototypetojson">TC39 meeting notes</a></li>
<li><code>Error.isError</code> withdrawn and will be removed from the next major release, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-03/march-29.md#erroriserror">TC39 meeting notes</a></li>
<li>Added fallback for <code>Function#name</code> on non-extensible functions and functions with broken <code>toString</code> conversion, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/193" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/193/hovercard">#193</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.2.2">2.2.2 - 2016.04.06</a></h5><a id="user-content-222---20160406" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.2.2 - 2016.04.06" href="#222---20160406"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added conversion <code>-0</code> to <code>+0</code> to <code>Array#{indexOf, lastIndexOf}</code>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/316" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/ecma262/pull/316/hovercard">ES2016 fix</a></li>
<li>Added fixes for some <code>Math</code> methods in Tor Browser</li>
<li><code>Array.{from, of}</code> no longer calls prototype setters</li>
<li>Added workaround over Chrome DevTools strange behavior, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/186" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/186/hovercard">#186</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.2.1">2.2.1 - 2016.03.19</a></h5><a id="user-content-221---20160319" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.2.1 - 2016.03.19" href="#221---20160319"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed <code>Object.getOwnPropertyNames(window)</code> <code>2.1+</code> versions bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/181" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/181/hovercard">#181</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.2.0">2.2.0 - 2016.03.15</a></h5><a id="user-content-220---20160315" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.2.0 - 2016.03.15" href="#220---20160315"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>String#matchAll</code>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/String.prototype.matchAll">proposal</a></li>
<li>Added <code>Object#__(define|lookup)[GS]etter__</code>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/381" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/ecma262/pull/381/hovercard">annex B ES2017</a></li>
<li>Added <code>@@toPrimitive</code> methods to <code>Date</code> and <code>Symbol</code></li>
<li>Fixed <code>%TypedArray%#slice</code> in Edge ~ 13 (throws with <code>@@species</code> and wrapped / inherited constructor)</li>
<li>Some other minor fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.1.5">2.1.5 - 2016.03.12</a></h5><a id="user-content-215---20160312" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.1.5 - 2016.03.12" href="#215---20160312"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Improved support NodeJS domains in <code>Promise#then</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/180" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/180/hovercard">#180</a></li>
<li>Added fallback for <code>Date#toJSON</code> bug in Qt Script, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/173#issuecomment-193972502" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/173/hovercard">#173</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.1.4">2.1.4 - 2016.03.08</a></h5><a id="user-content-214---20160308" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.1.4 - 2016.03.08" href="#214---20160308"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added fallback for <code>Symbol</code> polyfill in Qt Script, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/173" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/173/hovercard">#173</a></li>
<li>Added one more fallback for IE11 <code>Script Access Denied</code> error with iframes, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/165" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/165/hovercard">#165</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.1.3">2.1.3 - 2016.02.29</a></h5><a id="user-content-213---20160229" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.1.3 - 2016.02.29" href="#213---20160229"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added fallback for <a href="https://github.com/stefanpenner/es6-promise/issues/169" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/stefanpenner/es6-promise/issues/169/hovercard"><code>es6-promise</code> package bug</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/176" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/176/hovercard">#176</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.1.2">2.1.2 - 2016.02.29</a></h5><a id="user-content-212---20160229" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.1.2 - 2016.02.29" href="#212---20160229"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some minor <code>Promise</code> fixes:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Browsers <code>rejectionhandled</code> event better HTML spec complaint</li>
<li>Errors in unhandled rejection handlers should not cause any problems</li>
<li>Fixed typo in feature detection</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.1.1">2.1.1 - 2016.02.22</a></h5><a id="user-content-211---20160222" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.1.1 - 2016.02.22" href="#211---20160222"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some <code>Promise</code> improvements:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Feature detection:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Added detection unhandled rejection tracking support - now it's available everywhere</strong>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/140" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/140/hovercard">#140</a></li>
<li>Added detection <code>@@species</code> pattern support for completely correct subclassing</li>
<li>Removed usage <code>Object.setPrototypeOf</code> from feature detection and noisy console message about it in FF</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>Promise.all</code> fixed for some very specific cases</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.1.0">2.1.0 - 2016.02.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-210---20160209" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.1.0 - 2016.02.09" href="#210---20160209"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>API</strong>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>ES5 polyfills are split and logic, used in other polyfills, moved to internal modules
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>All entry point works in ES3 environment like IE8- without <code>core-js/(library/)es5</code></strong></li>
<li><strong>Added all missed single entry points for ES5 polyfills</strong></li>
<li>Separated ES5 polyfills moved to the ES6 namespace. Why?
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Mainly, for prevent duplication features in different namespaces - logic of most required ES5 polyfills changed in ES6+:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Already added changes for: <code>Object</code> statics - should accept primitives, new whitespaces lists in <code>String#trim</code>, <code>parse(Int|float)</code>, <code>RegExp#toString</code> logic, <code>String#split</code>, etc</li>
<li>Should be changed in the future: <code>@@species</code> and <code>ToLength</code> logic in <code>Array</code> methods, <code>Date</code> parsing, <code>Function#bind</code>, etc</li>
<li>Should not be changed only several features like <code>Array.isArray</code> and <code>Date.now</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Some ES5 polyfills required for modern engines</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>All old entry points should work fine, but in the next major release API can be changed</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors</code> moved to the stage 3, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-01/2016-01-28.md#objectgetownpropertydescriptors-to-stage-3-jordan-harband-low-priority-but-super-quick">January TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li>Added <code>umd</code> option for <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#custom-build-from-external-scripts">custom build process</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/169" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/169/hovercard">#169</a></li>
<li>Returned entry points for <code>Array</code> statics, removed in <code>2.0</code>, for compatibility with <code>babel</code> <code>6</code> and for future fixes</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>Deprecated</strong>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Reflect.enumerate</code> deprecated and will be removed from the next major release, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2016-01/2016-01-28.md#5xix-revisit-proxy-enumerate---revisit-decision-to-exhaust-iterator">January TC39 meeting</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>New Features</strong>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://rbuckton.github.io/reflect-metadata/" rel="nofollow"><code>Reflect</code> metadata API</a> as a pre-strawman feature, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/152" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/152/hovercard">#152</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Reflect.defineMetadata</code></li>
<li><code>Reflect.deleteMetadata</code></li>
<li><code>Reflect.getMetadata</code></li>
<li><code>Reflect.getMetadataKeys</code></li>
<li><code>Reflect.getOwnMetadata</code></li>
<li><code>Reflect.getOwnMetadataKeys</code></li>
<li><code>Reflect.hasMetadata</code></li>
<li><code>Reflect.hasOwnMetadata</code></li>
<li><code>Reflect.metadata</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Implementation / fixes <code>Date#toJSON</code></li>
<li>Fixes for <code>parseInt</code> and <code>Number.parseInt</code></li>
<li>Fixes for <code>parseFloat</code> and <code>Number.parseFloat</code></li>
<li>Fixes for <code>RegExp#toString</code></li>
<li>Fixes for <code>Array#sort</code></li>
<li>Fixes for <code>Number#toFixed</code></li>
<li>Fixes for <code>Number#toPrecision</code></li>
<li>Additional fixes for <code>String#split</code> (<code>RegExp#@@split</code>)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>Improvements</strong>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Correct subclassing wrapped collections, <code>Number</code> and <code>RegExp</code> constructors with native class syntax</li>
<li>Correct support <code>SharedArrayBuffer</code> and buffers from other realms in typed arrays wrappers</li>
<li>Additional validations for <code>Object.{defineProperty, getOwnPropertyDescriptor}</code> and <code>Reflect.defineProperty</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>Bug Fixes</strong>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed some cases <code>Array#lastIndexOf</code> with negative second argument</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.0.3">2.0.3 - 2016.01.11</a></h5><a id="user-content-203---20160111" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.0.3 - 2016.01.11" href="#203---20160111"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added fallback for V8 ~ Chrome 49 <code>Promise</code> subclassing bug causes unhandled rejection on feature detection, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/159" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/159/hovercard">#159</a></li>
<li>Added fix for very specific environments with global <code>window === null</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.0.2">2.0.2 - 2016.01.04</a></h5><a id="user-content-202---20160104" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.0.2 - 2016.01.04" href="#202---20160104"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Temporarily removed <code>length</code> validation from <code>Uint8Array</code> constructor wrapper. Reason - <a href="https://github.com/websockets/ws/pull/645" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/websockets/ws/pull/645/hovercard">bug in <code>ws</code> module</a> (-&gt; <code>socket.io</code>) which passes to <code>Buffer</code> constructor -&gt; <code>Uint8Array</code> float and uses <a href="https://code.google.com/p/v8/issues/detail?id=4552" rel="nofollow">the <code>V8</code> bug</a> for conversion to int (by the spec should be thrown an error). <a href="https://github.com/karma-runner/karma/issues/1768" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/karma-runner/karma/issues/1768/hovercard">It creates problems for many people.</a> I hope, it will be returned after fixing this bug in <code>V8</code>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.0.1">2.0.1 - 2015.12.31</a></h5><a id="user-content-201---20151231" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.0.1 - 2015.12.31" href="#201---20151231"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Forced usage <code>Promise.resolve</code> polyfill in the <code>library</code> version for correct work with wrapper</li>
<li><code>Object.assign</code> should be defined in the strict mode -&gt; throw an error on extension non-extensible objects, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/154" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/154/hovercard">#154</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v2.0.0">2.0.0 - 2015.12.24</a></h5><a id="user-content-200---20151224" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.0.0 - 2015.12.24" href="#200---20151224"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added implementations and fixes <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-typed-arrays">Typed Arrays</a>-related features
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>ArrayBuffer</code>, <code>ArrayBuffer.isView</code>, <code>ArrayBuffer#slice</code></li>
<li><code>DataView</code> with all getter / setter methods</li>
<li><code>Int8Array</code>, <code>Uint8Array</code>, <code>Uint8ClampedArray</code>, <code>Int16Array</code>, <code>Uint16Array</code>, <code>Int32Array</code>, <code>Uint32Array</code>, <code>Float32Array</code> and <code>Float64Array</code> constructors</li>
<li><code>%TypedArray%.{for, of}</code>, <code>%TypedArray%#{copyWithin, every, fill, filter, find, findIndex, forEach, indexOf, includes, join, lastIndexOf, map, reduce, reduceRight, reverse, set, slice, some, sort, subarray, values, keys, entries, @@iterator, ...}</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>System.global</code></a>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-global">proposal</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-19.md#systemglobal-jhd">November TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>Error.isError</code></a>, <a href="https://github.com/ljharb/proposal-is-error">proposal</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-19.md#jhd-erroriserror">November TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>Math.{iaddh, isubh, imulh, umulh}</code></a>, <a href="https://gist.github.com/BrendanEich/4294d5c212a6d2254703">proposal</a></li>
<li><code>RegExp.escape</code> moved from the <code>es7</code> to the non-standard <code>core</code> namespace, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-07/july-28.md#62-regexpescape">July TC39 meeting</a> - too slow, but it's condition of stability, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/116" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/116/hovercard">#116</a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-promise"><code>Promise</code></a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some performance optimisations</li>
<li>Added basic support <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#unhandled-rejection-tracking"><code>rejectionHandled</code> event / <code>onrejectionhandled</code> handler</a> to the polyfill</li>
<li>Removed usage <code>@@species</code> from <code>Promise.{all, race}</code>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-18.md#conclusionresolution-2">November TC39 meeting</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Some improvements <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-collections">collections polyfills</a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>O(1)</code> and preventing possible leaks with frozen keys, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/134" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/134/hovercard">#134</a></li>
<li>Correct observable state object keys</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Renamed <code>String#{padLeft, padRight}</code> -&gt; <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>String#{padStart, padEnd}</code></a>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/proposal-string-pad-start-end">proposal</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-17.md#conclusionresolution-2">November TC39 meeting</a> (they want to rename it on each meeting?O_o), <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/132" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/132/hovercard">#132</a></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>String#{trimStart, trimEnd}</code> as aliases for <code>String#{trimLeft, trimRight}</code></a>, <a href="https://github.com/sebmarkbage/ecmascript-string-left-right-trim">proposal</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2015-11/nov-17.md#conclusionresolution-2">November TC39 meeting</a></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-string">annex B HTML methods</a> - ugly, but also <a href="https://262.ecma-international.org/6.0/#sec-string.prototype.anchor" rel="nofollow">the part of the spec</a></li>
<li>Added little fix for <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-6-date"><code>Date#toString</code></a> - <code>new Date(NaN).toString()</code> <a href="https://262.ecma-international.org/6.0/#sec-todatestring" rel="nofollow">should be <code>'Invalid Date'</code></a></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#iterable-dom-collections"><code>{keys, values, entries, @@iterator}</code> methods to DOM collections</a> which should have <a href="https://heycam.github.io/webidl/#idl-iterable" rel="nofollow">iterable interface</a> or should be <a href="https://heycam.github.io/webidl/#LegacyArrayClass" rel="nofollow">inherited from <code>Array</code></a> - <code>NodeList</code>, <code>DOMTokenList</code>, <code>MediaList</code>, <code>StyleSheetList</code>, <code>CSSRuleList</code>.</li>
<li>Removed Mozilla <code>Array</code> generics - <a href="https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Array#Array_generic_methods" rel="nofollow">deprecated and will be removed from FF</a>, <a href="https://web.archive.org/web/20160805230354/http://wiki.ecmascript.org/doku.php?id=strawman:array_statics" rel="nofollow">looks like strawman is dead</a>, available <a href="https://github.com/plusdude/array-generics">alternative shim</a></li>
<li>Removed <code>core.log</code> module</li>
<li>CommonJS API
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added entry points for <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#commonjs-and-prototype-methods-without-global-namespace-pollution">virtual methods</a></li>
<li>Added entry points for <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#ecmascript-7-proposals">stages proposals</a></li>
<li>Some other minor changes</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js#custom-build-from-external-scripts">Custom build from external scripts</a> moved to the separate package for preventing problems with dependencies</li>
<li>Changed <code>$</code> prefix for internal modules file names because Team Foundation Server does not support it, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/129" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/129/hovercard">#129</a></li>
<li>Additional fix for <code>SameValueZero</code> in V8 ~ Chromium 39-42 collections</li>
<li>Additional fix for FF27 <code>Array</code> iterator</li>
<li>Removed usage shortcuts for <code>arguments</code> object - old WebKit bug, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/150" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/150/hovercard">#150</a></li>
<li><code>{Map, Set}#forEach</code> non-generic, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/144" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/144/hovercard">#144</a></li>
<li>Many other improvements</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.2.6">1.2.6 - 2015.11.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-126---20151109" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.2.6 - 2015.11.09" href="#126---20151109"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Reject with <code>TypeError</code> on attempt resolve promise itself</li>
<li>Correct behavior with broken <code>Promise</code> subclass constructors / methods</li>
<li>Added <code>Promise</code>-based fallback for microtask</li>
<li>Fixed V8 and FF <code>Array#{values, @@iterator}.name</code></li>
<li>Fixed IE7- <code>[1, 2].join(undefined) -&gt; '1,2'</code></li>
<li>Some other fixes / improvements / optimizations</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.2.5">1.2.5 - 2015.11.02</a></h5><a id="user-content-125---20151102" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.2.5 - 2015.11.02" href="#125---20151102"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some more <code>Number</code> constructor fixes:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed V8 ~ Node 0.8 bug: <code>Number('+0x1')</code> should be <code>NaN</code></li>
<li>Fixed <code>Number(' 0b1\n')</code> case, should be <code>1</code></li>
<li>Fixed <code>Number()</code> case, should be <code>0</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.2.4">1.2.4 - 2015.11.01</a></h5><a id="user-content-124---20151101" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.2.4 - 2015.11.01" href="#124---20151101"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed <code>Number('0b12') -&gt; NaN</code> case in the shim</li>
<li>Fixed V8 ~ Chromium 40- bug - <code>Weak(Map|Set)#{delete, get, has}</code> should not throw errors <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/124" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/124/hovercard">#124</a></li>
<li>Some other fixes and optimizations</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.2.3">1.2.3 - 2015.10.23</a></h5><a id="user-content-123---20151023" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.2.3 - 2015.10.23" href="#123---20151023"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed some problems related old V8 bug <code>Object('a').propertyIsEnumerable(0) // =&gt; false</code>, for example, <code>Object.assign({}, 'qwe')</code> from the last release</li>
<li>Fixed <code>.name</code> property and <code>Function#toString</code> conversion some polyfilled methods</li>
<li>Fixed <code>Math.imul</code> arity in Safari 8-</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.2.2">1.2.2 - 2015.10.18</a></h5><a id="user-content-122---20151018" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.2.2 - 2015.10.18" href="#122---20151018"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Improved optimisations for V8</li>
<li>Fixed build process from external packages, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/pull/120" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/120/hovercard">#120</a></li>
<li>One more <code>Object.{assign, values, entries}</code> fix for <a href="https://github.com/ljharb/proposal-object-values-entries/issues/5" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-object-values-entries/issues/5/hovercard"><strong>very</strong> specific case</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.2.1">1.2.1 - 2015.10.02</a></h5><a id="user-content-121---20151002" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.2.1 - 2015.10.02" href="#121---20151002"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Replaced fix <code>JSON.stringify</code> + <code>Symbol</code> behavior from <code>.toJSON</code> method to wrapping <code>JSON.stringify</code> - little more correct, <a href="https://github.com/kangax/compat-table/pull/642" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/compat-table/compat-table/pull/642/hovercard">compat-table/642</a></li>
<li>Fixed typo which broke tasks scheduler in WebWorkers in old FF, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/pull/114" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/pull/114/hovercard">#114</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.2.0">1.2.0 - 2015.09.27</a></h5><a id="user-content-120---20150927" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.2.0 - 2015.09.27" href="#120---20150927"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added browser <a href="#unhandled-rejection-tracking"><code>Promise</code> rejection hook</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/106" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/106/hovercard">#106</a></li>
<li>Added correct <a href="https://262.ecma-international.org/6.0/#sec-isregexp" rel="nofollow"><code>IsRegExp</code></a> logic to <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-string"><code>String#{includes, startsWith, endsWith}</code></a> and <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-regexp"><code>RegExp</code> constructor</a>, <code>@@match</code> case, <a href="https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Symbol/match#Disabling_the_isRegExp_check" rel="nofollow">example</a></li>
<li>Updated <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>String#leftPad</code></a> <a href="https://github.com/ljharb/proposal-string-pad-left-right/issues/6" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/tc39/proposal-string-pad-start-end/issues/6/hovercard">with proposal</a>: string filler truncated from the right side</li>
<li>Replaced V8 <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-object"><code>Object.assign</code></a> - its properties order not only incorrect, it is non-deterministic and it causes some problems</li>
<li>Fixed behavior with deleted in getters properties for <code>Object.{</code><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-object"><code>assign</code></a><code>, </code><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>entries, values</code></a><code>}</code>, <a href="http://goo.gl/iQE01c" rel="nofollow">example</a></li>
<li>Fixed <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-math"><code>Math.sinh</code></a> with very small numbers in V8 near Chromium 38</li>
<li>Some other fixes and optimizations</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.1.4">1.1.4 - 2015.09.05</a></h5><a id="user-content-114---20150905" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.1.4 - 2015.09.05" href="#114---20150905"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed support symbols in FF34-35 <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-object"><code>Object.assign</code></a></li>
<li>Fixed <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-iterators">collections iterators</a> in FF25-26</li>
<li>Fixed non-generic WebKit <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-array"><code>Array.of</code></a></li>
<li>Some other fixes and optimizations</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.1.3">1.1.3 - 2015.08.29</a></h5><a id="user-content-113---20150829" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.1.3 - 2015.08.29" href="#113---20150829"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed support Node.js domains in <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-promise"><code>Promise</code></a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/103" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/103/hovercard">#103</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.1.2">1.1.2 - 2015.08.28</a></h5><a id="user-content-112---20150828" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.1.2 - 2015.08.28" href="#112---20150828"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>toJSON</code> method to <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-symbol"><code>Symbol</code></a> polyfill and to MS Edge implementation for expected <code>JSON.stringify</code> result w/o patching this method</li>
<li>Replaced <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-reflect"><code>Reflect.construct</code></a> implementations w/o correct support third argument</li>
<li>Fixed <code>global</code> detection with changed <code>document.domain</code> in ~IE8, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/100" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/100/hovercard">#100</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.1.1">1.1.1 - 2015.08.20</a></h5><a id="user-content-111---20150820" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.1.1 - 2015.08.20" href="#111---20150820"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added more correct microtask implementation for <a href="#ecmascript-6-promise"><code>Promise</code></a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.1.0">1.1.0 - 2015.08.17</a></h5><a id="user-content-110---20150817" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.1.0 - 2015.08.17" href="#110---20150817"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Updated <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals">string padding</a> to <a href="https://github.com/ljharb/proposal-string-pad-left-right">actual proposal</a> - renamed, minor internal changes:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>String#lpad</code> -&gt; <code>String#padLeft</code></li>
<li><code>String#rpad</code> -&gt; <code>String#padRight</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <a href="#ecmascript-7-proposals">string trim functions</a> - <a href="https://github.com/sebmarkbage/ecmascript-string-left-right-trim">proposal</a>, defacto standard - required only for IE11- and fixed for some old engines:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>String#trimLeft</code></li>
<li><code>String#trimRight</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-string"><code>String#trim</code></a> fixed for some engines by es6 spec and moved from <code>es5</code> to single <code>es6</code> module</li>
<li>Split <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-object"><code>es6.object.statics-accept-primitives</code></a></li>
<li>Caps for <code>freeze</code>-family <code>Object</code> methods moved from <code>es5</code> to <code>es6</code> namespace and joined with <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-object">es6 wrappers</a></li>
<li><code>es5</code> <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#commonjs">namespace</a> also includes modules, moved to <code>es6</code> namespace - you can use it as before</li>
<li>Increased <code>MessageChannel</code> priority in <code>$.task</code>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/95" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/95/hovercard">#95</a></li>
<li>Does not get <code>global.Symbol</code> on each getting iterator, if you wanna use alternative <code>Symbol</code> shim - add it before <code>core-js</code></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-reflect"><code>Reflect.construct</code></a> optimized and fixed for some cases</li>
<li>Simplified <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-reflect"><code>Reflect.enumerate</code></a>, see <a href="https://esdiscuss.org/topic/question-about-enumerate-and-property-decision-timing" rel="nofollow">this question</a></li>
<li>Some corrections in <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-math"><code>Math.acosh</code></a></li>
<li>Fixed <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-math"><code>Math.imul</code></a> for old WebKit</li>
<li>Some fixes in string / RegExp <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-regexp">well-known symbols</a> logic</li>
<li>Some other fixes and optimizations</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.0.1">1.0.1 - 2015.07.31</a></h5><a id="user-content-101---20150731" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.0.1 - 2015.07.31" href="#101---20150731"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some fixes for final MS Edge, replaced broken native <code>Reflect.defineProperty</code></li>
<li>Some minor fixes and optimizations</li>
<li>Changed compression <code>client/*.min.js</code> options for safe <code>Function#name</code> and <code>Function#length</code>, should be fixed <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/92" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/92/hovercard">#92</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v1.0.0">1.0.0 - 2015.07.22</a></h5><a id="user-content-100---20150722" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.0.0 - 2015.07.22" href="#100---20150722"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added logic for <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-regexp">well-known symbols</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Symbol.match</code></li>
<li><code>Symbol.replace</code></li>
<li><code>Symbol.split</code></li>
<li><code>Symbol.search</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Actualized and optimized work with iterables:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Optimized  <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-collections"><code>Map</code>, <code>Set</code>, <code>WeakMap</code>, <code>WeakSet</code> constructors</a>, <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-promise"><code>Promise.all</code>, <code>Promise.race</code></a> for default <code>Array Iterator</code></li>
<li>Optimized  <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-array"><code>Array.from</code></a> for default <code>Array Iterator</code></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-iterators"><code>core.getIteratorMethod</code></a> helper</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Uses enumerable properties in shimmed instances - collections, iterators, etc for optimize performance</li>
<li>Added support native constructors to <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-reflect"><code>Reflect.construct</code></a> with 2 arguments</li>
<li>Added support native constructors to <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-5"><code>Function#bind</code></a> shim with <code>new</code></li>
<li>Removed obsolete <code>.clear</code> methods native <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-collections"><code>Weak</code>-collections</a></li>
<li>Maximum modularity, reduced minimal custom build size, separated into submodules:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-reflect"><code>es6.reflect</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-regexp"><code>es6.regexp</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-math"><code>es6.math</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-number"><code>es6.number</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>es7.object.to-array</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#object"><code>core.object</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#escaping-strings"><code>core.string</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-iterators"><code>core.iter-helpers</code></a></li>
<li>Internal modules (<code>$</code>, <code>$.iter</code>, etc)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Many other optimizations</li>
<li>Final cleaning non-standard features
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Moved <code>$for</code> to <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/forof">separate library</a>. This work for syntax - <code>for-of</code> loop and comprehensions</li>
<li>Moved <code>Date#{format, formatUTC}</code> to <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/dtf">separate library</a>. Standard way for this - <code>ECMA-402</code></li>
<li>Removed <code>Math</code> methods from <code>Number.prototype</code>. Slight sugar for simple <code>Math</code> methods calling</li>
<li>Removed <code>{Array#, Array, Dict}.turn</code></li>
<li>Removed <code>core.global</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Uses <code>ToNumber</code> instead of <code>ToLength</code> in <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#number-iterator"><code>Number Iterator</code></a>, <code>Array.from(2.5)</code> will be <code>[0, 1, 2]</code> instead of <code>[0, 1]</code></li>
<li>Fixed <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/85" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/85/hovercard">#85</a> - invalid <code>Promise</code> unhandled rejection message in nested <code>setTimeout</code></li>
<li>Fixed <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/86" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/86/hovercard">#86</a> - support FF extensions</li>
<li>Fixed <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/89" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/89/hovercard">#89</a> - behavior <code>Number</code> constructor in strange case</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.18">0.9.18 - 2015.06.17</a></h5><a id="user-content-0918---20150617" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.18 - 2015.06.17" href="#0918---20150617"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Removed <code>/</code> from <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>RegExp.escape</code></a> escaped characters</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.17">0.9.17 - 2015.06.14</a></h5><a id="user-content-0917---20150614" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.17 - 2015.06.14" href="#0917---20150614"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Updated <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>RegExp.escape</code></a> to the <a href="https://github.com/benjamingr/RexExp.escape">latest proposal</a></li>
<li>Fixed conflict with webpack dev server + IE buggy behavior</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.16">0.9.16 - 2015.06.11</a></h5><a id="user-content-0916---20150611" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.16 - 2015.06.11" href="#0916---20150611"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>More correct order resolving thenable in <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-promise"><code>Promise</code></a> polyfill</li>
<li>Uses polyfill instead of <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/78" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/78/hovercard">buggy V8 <code>Promise</code></a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.15">0.9.15 - 2015.06.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-0915---20150609" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.15 - 2015.06.09" href="#0915---20150609"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-collections">Collections</a> from <code>library</code> version return wrapped native instances</li>
<li>Fixed collections prototype methods in <code>library</code> version</li>
<li>Optimized <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-math"><code>Math.hypot</code></a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.14">0.9.14 - 2015.06.04</a></h5><a id="user-content-0914---20150604" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.14 - 2015.06.04" href="#0914---20150604"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Updated <a href="https://esdiscuss.org/topic/fixing-promise-resolve" rel="nofollow"><code>Promise.resolve</code> behavior</a></li>
<li>Added fallback for IE11 buggy <code>Object.getOwnPropertyNames</code> + iframe</li>
<li>Some other fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.13">0.9.13 - 2015.05.25</a></h5><a id="user-content-0913---20150525" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.13 - 2015.05.25" href="#0913---20150525"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added fallback for <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-symbol"><code>Symbol</code> polyfill</a> for old Android</li>
<li>Some other fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.12">0.9.12 - 2015.05.24</a></h5><a id="user-content-0912---20150524" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.12 - 2015.05.24" href="#0912---20150524"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.10">0.9.10 - 2015.05.16</a></h5><a id="user-content-0910---20150516" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.10 - 2015.05.16" href="#0910---20150516"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Wrapped <code>Function#toString</code> for correct work wrapped methods / constructors with methods similar to the <a href="https://github.com/lodash/lodash/issues/1197" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/lodash/lodash/issues/1197/hovercard"><code>lodash</code> <code>isNative</code></a></li>
<li>Added proto versions of methods to export object in <code>default</code> version for consistency with <code>library</code> version</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.9">0.9.9 - 2015.05.14</a></h5><a id="user-content-099---20150514" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.9 - 2015.05.14" href="#099---20150514"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Wrapped <code>Object#propertyIsEnumerable</code> for <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-symbol"><code>Symbol</code> polyfill</a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/issues/65" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/zloirock/core-js/issues/65/hovercard">Added proto versions of methods to <code>library</code> for ES7 bind syntax</a></li>
<li>Some other fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.8">0.9.8 - 2015.05.12</a></h5><a id="user-content-098---20150512" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.8 - 2015.05.12" href="#098---20150512"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.2">0.9.2 - 2015.04.25</a></h5><a id="user-content-092---20150425" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.2 - 2015.04.25" href="#092---20150425"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
