</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.1">0.9.1 - 2015.04.25</a></h5><a id="user-content-091---20150425" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.1 - 2015.04.25" href="#091---20150425"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed <code>__proto__</code>-based <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-promise"><code>Promise</code></a> subclassing in some environments</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.9.0">0.9.0 - 2015.04.24</a></h5><a id="user-content-090---20150424" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.9.0 - 2015.04.24" href="#090---20150424"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added correct <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-symbol">symbols</a> descriptors
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed behavior <code>Object.{assign, create, defineProperty, defineProperties, getOwnPropertyDescriptor, getOwnPropertyDescriptors}</code> with symbols</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#commonjs">single entry points</a> for <code>Object.{create, defineProperty, defineProperties}</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>Map#toJSON</code></a></li>
<li>Removed non-standard methods <code>Object#[_]</code> and <code>Function#only</code> - they solves syntax problems, but now in compilers available arrows and <del>in near future will be available</del> <a href="https://babeljs.io/blog/2015/05/14/function-bind/" rel="nofollow">available</a> <a href="https://github.com/zenparsing/es-function-bind">bind syntax</a></li>
<li>Removed non-standard undocumented methods <code>Symbol.{pure, set}</code></li>
<li>Some fixes and internal changes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.8.4">0.8.4 - 2015.04.18</a></h5><a id="user-content-084---20150418" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.8.4 - 2015.04.18" href="#084---20150418"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Uses <code>webpack</code> instead of <code>browserify</code> for browser builds - more compression-friendly result</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.8.3">0.8.3 - 2015.04.14</a></h5><a id="user-content-083---20150414" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.8.3 - 2015.04.14" href="#083---20150414"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed <code>Array</code> statics with single entry points</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.8.2">0.8.2 - 2015.04.13</a></h5><a id="user-content-082---20150413" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.8.2 - 2015.04.13" href="#082---20150413"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-math"><code>Math.fround</code></a> now also works in IE9-</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>Set#toJSON</code></a></li>
<li>Some optimizations and fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.8.1">0.8.1 - 2015.04.03</a></h5><a id="user-content-081---20150403" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.8.1 - 2015.04.03" href="#081---20150403"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed <code>Symbol.keyFor</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.8.0">0.8.0 - 2015.04.02</a></h5><a id="user-content-080---20150402" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.8.0 - 2015.04.02" href="#080---20150402"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Changed <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#commonjs">CommonJS API</a></li>
<li>Split and renamed some modules</li>
<li>Added support ES3 environment (ES5 polyfill) to <strong>all</strong> default versions - size increases slightly (+ ~4kb w/o gzip), many issues disappear, if you don't need it - <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#commonjs">simply include only required namespaces / features / modules</a></li>
<li>Removed <a href="https://github.com/zenparsing/es-abstract-refs">abstract references</a> support - proposal has been superseded =\</li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-iterators"><code>$for.isIterable</code> -&gt; <code>core.isIterable</code>, <code>$for.getIterator</code> -&gt; <code>core.getIterator</code></a>, temporary available in old namespace</li>
<li>Fixed iterators support in v8 <code>Promise.all</code> and <code>Promise.race</code></li>
<li>Many other fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.7.2">0.7.2 - 2015.03.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-072---20150309" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.7.2 - 2015.03.09" href="#072---20150309"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.7.1">0.7.1 - 2015.03.07</a></h5><a id="user-content-071---20150307" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.7.1 - 2015.03.07" href="#071---20150307"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.7.0">0.7.0 - 2015.03.06</a></h5><a id="user-content-070---20150306" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.7.0 - 2015.03.06" href="#070---20150306"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Rewritten and split into <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#commonjs">CommonJS modules</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.6.1">0.6.1 - 2015.02.24</a></h5><a id="user-content-061---20150224" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.6.1 - 2015.02.24" href="#061---20150224"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed support <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-5"><code>Object.defineProperty</code></a> with accessors on DOM elements on IE8</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.6.0">0.6.0 - 2015.02.23</a></h5><a id="user-content-060---20150223" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.6.0 - 2015.02.23" href="#060---20150223"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added support safe closing iteration - calling <code>iterator.return</code> on abort iteration, if it exists</li>
<li>Added basic support <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-promise"><code>Promise</code></a> unhandled rejection tracking in shim</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors</code></a></li>
<li>Removed <code>console</code> cap - creates too many problems</li>
<li>Restructuring <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#custom-build">namespaces</a></li>
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.5.4">0.5.4 - 2015.02.15</a></h5><a id="user-content-054---20150215" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.5.4 - 2015.02.15" href="#054---20150215"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.5.3">0.5.3 - 2015.02.14</a></h5><a id="user-content-053---20150214" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.5.3 - 2015.02.14" href="#053---20150214"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-number">support binary and octal literals</a> to <code>Number</code> constructor</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-5"><code>Date#toISOString</code></a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.5.2">0.5.2 - 2015.02.10</a></h5><a id="user-content-052---20150210" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.5.2 - 2015.02.10" href="#052---20150210"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.5.1">0.5.1 - 2015.02.09</a></h5><a id="user-content-051---20150209" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.5.1 - 2015.02.09" href="#051---20150209"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.5.0">0.5.0 - 2015.02.08</a></h5><a id="user-content-050---20150208" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.5.0 - 2015.02.08" href="#050---20150208"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Systematization of modules</li>
<li>Split <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6"><code>es6</code> module</a></li>
<li>Split <code>console</code> module: <code>web.console</code> - only cap for missing methods, <code>core.log</code> - bound methods &amp; additional features</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#delay"><code>delay</code> method</a></li>
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.4.10">0.4.10 - 2015.01.28</a></h5><a id="user-content-0410---20150128" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.4.10 - 2015.01.28" href="#0410---20150128"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.4.6">0.4.6 - 2015.01.21</a></h5><a id="user-content-046---20150121" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.4.6 - 2015.01.21" href="#046---20150121"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-symbol"><code>Object.getOwnPropertySymbols</code></a></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-iterators"><code>NodeList.prototype[@@iterator]</code></a></li>
<li>Added basic <code>@@species</code> logic - getter in native constructors</li>
<li>Removed <code>Function#by</code></li>
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.4.3">0.4.3 - 2015.01.10</a></h5><a id="user-content-043---20150110" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.4.3 - 2015.01.10" href="#043---20150110"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.4.2">0.4.2 - 2015.01.10</a></h5><a id="user-content-042---20150110" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.4.2 - 2015.01.10" href="#042---20150110"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Object</code> static methods accept primitives</li>
<li><code>RegExp</code> constructor can alter flags (IE9+)</li>
<li>Added <code>Array.prototype[Symbol.unscopables]</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.4.1">0.4.1 - 2015.01.05</a></h5><a id="user-content-041---20150105" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.4.1 - 2015.01.05" href="#041---20150105"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.4.0">0.4.0 - 2015.01.03</a></h5><a id="user-content-040---20150103" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.4.0 - 2015.01.03" href="#040---20150103"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-reflect"><code>es6.reflect</code></a> module:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>Reflect.apply</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.construct</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.defineProperty</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.deleteProperty</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.enumerate</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.get</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.getOwnPropertyDescriptor</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.getPrototypeOf</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.has</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.isExtensible</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.preventExtensions</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.set</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Reflect.setPrototypeOf</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>core-js</code> methods now can use external <code>Symbol.iterator</code> polyfill</li>
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.3.3">0.3.3 - 2014.12.28</a></h5><a id="user-content-033---20141228" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.3.3 - 2014.12.28" href="#033---20141228"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#console">Console cap</a> excluded from node.js default builds</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.3.2">0.3.2 - 2014.12.25</a></h5><a id="user-content-032---20141225" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.3.2 - 2014.12.25" href="#032---20141225"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added cap for <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-5">ES5</a> freeze-family methods</li>
<li>Fixed <code>console</code> bug</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.3.1">0.3.1 - 2014.12.23</a></h5><a id="user-content-031---20141223" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.3.1 - 2014.12.23" href="#031---20141223"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.3.0">0.3.0 - 2014.12.23</a></h5><a id="user-content-030---20141223" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.3.0 - 2014.12.23" href="#030---20141223"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Optimize <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-collections"><code>Map</code> &amp; <code>Set</code></a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Use entries chain on hash table</li>
<li>Fast &amp; correct iteration</li>
<li>Iterators moved to <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6"><code>es6</code></a> and <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-collections"><code>es6.collections</code></a> modules</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.2.5">0.2.5 - 2014.12.20</a></h5><a id="user-content-025---20141220" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.2.5 - 2014.12.20" href="#025---20141220"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>console</code> no longer shortcut for <code>console.log</code> (compatibility problems)</li>
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.2.4">0.2.4 - 2014.12.17</a></h5><a id="user-content-024---20141217" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.2.4 - 2014.12.17" href="#024---20141217"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Better compliance of ES6</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-math"><code>Math.fround</code></a> (IE10+)</li>
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.2.3">0.2.3 - 2014.12.15</a></h5><a id="user-content-023---20141215" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.2.3 - 2014.12.15" href="#023---20141215"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-symbol">Symbols</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added option to disable addition setter to <code>Object.prototype</code> for Symbol polyfill:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>Symbol.useSimple</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.useSetter</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Added cap for well-known Symbols:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>Symbol.hasInstance</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.isConcatSpreadable</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.match</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.replace</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.search</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.species</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.split</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.toPrimitive</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.unscopables</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.2.2">0.2.2 - 2014.12.13</a></h5><a id="user-content-022---20141213" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.2.2 - 2014.12.13" href="#022---20141213"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-regexp"><code>RegExp#flags</code></a> (<a href="https://web.archive.org/web/20170119181824/http://wiki.ecmascript.org/doku.php?id=harmony:specification_drafts" rel="nofollow">December 2014 Draft Rev 29</a>)</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-string"><code>String.raw</code></a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.2.1">0.2.1 - 2014.12.12</a></h5><a id="user-content-021---20141212" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.2.1 - 2014.12.12" href="#021---20141212"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Repair converting -0 to +0 in <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-collections">native collections</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.2.0">0.2.0 - 2014.12.06</a></h5><a id="user-content-020---20141206" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.2.0 - 2014.12.06" href="#020---20141206"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>es7.proposals</code></a> and <a href="https://github.com/zenparsing/es-abstract-refs"><code>es7.abstract-refs</code></a> modules</li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>String#at</code></a></li>
<li>Added real <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-iterators"><code>String Iterator</code></a>, older versions used Array Iterator</li>
<li>Added abstract references support:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <code>Symbol.referenceGet</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.referenceSet</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Symbol.referenceDelete</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Function#@@referenceGet</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Map#@@referenceGet</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Map#@@referenceSet</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Map#@@referenceDelete</code></li>
<li>Added <code>WeakMap#@@referenceGet</code></li>
<li>Added <code>WeakMap#@@referenceSet</code></li>
<li>Added <code>WeakMap#@@referenceDelete</code></li>
<li>Added <code>Dict.{...methods}[@@referenceGet]</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Removed deprecated <code>.contains</code> methods</li>
<li>Some fixes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.1.5">0.1.5 - 2014.12.01</a></h5><a id="user-content-015---20141201" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.1.5 - 2014.12.01" href="#015---20141201"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-array"><code>Array#copyWithin</code></a></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-string"><code>String#codePointAt</code></a></li>
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-string"><code>String.fromCodePoint</code></a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.1.4">0.1.4 - 2014.11.27</a></h5><a id="user-content-014---20141127" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.1.4 - 2014.11.27" href="#014---20141127"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#dict"><code>Dict.mapPairs</code></a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.1.3">0.1.3 - 2014.11.20</a></h5><a id="user-content-013---20141120" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.1.3 - 2014.11.20" href="#013---20141120"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2014-11">TC39 November meeting</a>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2014-11/nov-18.md#51--44-arrayprototypecontains-and-stringprototypecontains"><code>.contains</code> -&gt; <code>.includes</code></a>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>String#contains</code> -&gt; <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-6-string"><code>String#includes</code></a></li>
<li><code>Array#contains</code> -&gt; <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#ecmascript-7-proposals"><code>Array#includes</code></a></li>
<li><code>Dict.contains</code> -&gt; <a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/#dict"><code>Dict.includes</code></a></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2014-11/nov-19.md#412-should-weakmapweakset-have-a-clear-method-markm">Removed <code>WeakMap#clear</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/tc39/notes/blob/main/meetings/2014-11/nov-19.md#412-should-weakmapweakset-have-a-clear-method-markm">Removed <code>WeakSet#clear</code></a></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/zloirock/core-js/releases/tag/v0.1.2">0.1.2 - 2014.11.19</a></h5><a id="user-content-012---20141119" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 0.1.2 - 2014.11.19" href="#012---20141119"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Map</code> &amp; <code>Set</code> bug fix</li>
</ul>
